<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```jsx
import { useState } from 'react'
import { Link, useNavigate, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom'
import { Outlet } from 'react-router-dom'
import { useSelector, useDispatch } from 'react-redux'
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion'
import {
  ShoppingCart,
  User,
  Menu,
  X,
  Heart,
  Bell,
  LogOut,
  ChefHat,
  Truck,
  LayoutDashboard,
  Search,
} from 'lucide-react'
import { logout } from '../slices/authSlice'
import { selectCartCount } from '../slices/cartSlice'
import { selectUnreadCount } from '../slices/notificationsSlice'

export default function MainLayout() {
  const dispatch = useDispatch()
  const navigate = useNavigate()
  const location = useLocation()

  const { user, isAuthenticated } = useSelector((state) => state.auth)
  const cartCount = useSelector(selectCartCount)
  const unreadCount = useSelector(selectUnreadCount)

  const [mobileMenuOpen, setMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false)
  const [userMenuOpen, setUserMenuOpen] = useState(false)
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('')

  const handleLogout = () => {
    dispatch(logout())
    setUserMenuOpen(false)
    navigate('/')
  }

  const handleSearch = (e) => {
    e.preventDefault()
    if (searchQuery.trim()) {
      navigate(`/?search=${encodeURIComponent(searchQuery.trim())}`)
      setSearchQuery('')
    }
  }

  const navLinks = [
    { to: '/', label: 'Trang chu' },
    { to: '/cart', label: 'Gio hang' },
  ]

  const adminLink = isAuthenticated && user?.role === 'admin'
    ? { to: '/admin', label: 'Quan ly', icon: LayoutDashboard }
    : null

  const shipperLink = isAuthenticated && user?.role === 'shipper'
    ? { to: '/shipper', label: 'Shipper', icon: Truck }
    : null

  const allNavLinks = [...navLinks]
  if (adminLink) allNavLinks.push(adminLink)
  if (shipperLink) allNavLinks.push(shipperLink)

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex flex-col bg-gray-50">
      {/* Header */}
      <header className="bg-white shadow-sm sticky top-0 z-50">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between h-16">
            {/* Logo */}
            <Link to="/" className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-shrink-0">
              <ChefHat className="w-8 h-8 text-primary" />
              <span className="text-xl font-bold text-primary">Res-booking</span>
            </Link>

            {/* Desktop Nav */}
            <nav className="hidden md:flex items-center gap-6">
              {allNavLinks.map((link) => (
                <Link
                  key={link.to}
                  to={link.to}
                  className={`text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
                    location.pathname === link.to
                      ? 'text-primary'
                      : 'text-gray-600 hover:text-primary'
                  }`}
                >
                  {link.icon && <link.icon className="w-4 h-4 inline mr-1" />}
                  {link.label}
                </Link>
              ))}
            </nav>

            {/* Right side */}
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              {/* Search */}
              <form onSubmit={handleSearch} className="hidden md:block relative">
                <input
                  type="text"
                  placeholder="Tim kiem mon an..."
                  value={searchQuery}
                  onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
                  className="pl-9 pr-4 py-2 text-sm border border-gray-200 rounded-full focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary w-64"
                />
                <Search className="w-4 h-4 absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400" />
              </form>

              {/* Cart */}
              <Link
                to="/cart"
                className="relative p-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-primary transition-colors"
              >
                <ShoppingCart className="w-5 h-5" />
                {cartCount > 0 && (
                  <span className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 bg-primary text-white text-xs w-5 h-5 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center font-medium">
                    {cartCount > 9 ? '9+' : cartCount}
                  </span>
                )}
              </Link>

              {/* Wishlist */}
              {isAuthenticated && (
                <Link
                  to="/wishlist"
                  className="p-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-primary transition-colors"
                >
                  <Heart className="w-5 h-5" />
                </Link>
              )}

              {/* Notifications */}
              {isAuthenticated && (
                <Link
                  to="/notifications"
                  className="relative p-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-primary transition-colors"
                >
                  <Bell className="w-5 h-5" />
                  {unreadCount > 0 && (
                    <span className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 bg-red-500 text-white text-xs w-5 h-5 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center font-medium">
                      {unreadCount > 9 ? '9+' : unreadCount}
                    </span>
                  )}
                </Link>
              )}

              {/* User Menu */}
              {isAuthenticated ? (
                <div className="relative">
                  <button
                    onClick={() => setUserMenuOpen(!userMenuOpen)}
                    className="flex items-center gap-2 p-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-primary transition-colors"
                  >
                    <User className="w-5 h-5" />
                    <span className="hidden md:block text-sm font-medium">{user?.name}</span>
                  </button>
                  <AnimatePresence>
                    {userMenuOpen && (
                      <motion.div
                        initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 8 }}
                        animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
                        exit={{ opacity: 0, y: 8 }}
                        className="absolute right-0 mt-2 w-48 bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg border py-1 z-50"
                      >
                        <Link
                          to="/profile"
                          className="block px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50"
                          onClick={() => setUserMenuOpen(false)}
                        >
                          <User className="w-4 h-4 inline mr-2" />
                          Tai khoan
                        </Link>
                        <Link
                          to="/orders"
                          className="block px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50"
                          onClick={() => setUserMenuOpen(false)}
                        >
                          Don hang cua toi
                        </Link>
                        {(user?.role === 'admin' || user?.role === 'manager') && (
                          <Link
                            to="/admin"
                            className="block px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50"
                            onClick={() => setUserMenuOpen(false)}
                          >
                            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4 inline mr-2" />
                            Quan ly
                          </Link>
                        )}
                        {user?.role === 'shipper' && (
                          <Link
                            to="/shipper"
                            className="block px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50"
                            onClick={() => setUserMenuOpen(false)}
                          >
                            <Truck className="w-4 h-4 inline mr-2" />
                            Shipper
                          </Link>
                        )}
                        <hr className="my-1" />
                        <button
                          onClick={handleLogout}
                          className="w-full text-left px-4 py-2 text-sm text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50"
                        >
                          <LogOut className="w-4 h-4 inline mr-2" />
                          Dang xuat
                        </button>
                      </motion.div>
                    )}
                  </AnimatePresence>
                </div>
              ) : (
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <Link
                    to="/login"
                    className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600 hover:text-primary transition-colors"
                  >
                    Dang nhap
                  </Link>
                  <Link
                    to="/register"
                    className="px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium bg-primary text-white rounded-full hover:bg-primary-dark transition-colors"
                  >
                    Dang ky
                  </Link>
                </div>
              )}

              {/* Mobile menu toggle */}
              <button
                onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(!mobileMenuOpen)}
                className="md:hidden p-2 text-gray-600"
              >
                {mobileMenuOpen ? <X className="w-5 h-5" /> : <Menu className="w-5 h-5" />}
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Mobile menu */}
        <AnimatePresence>
          {mobileMenuOpen && (
            <motion.div
              initial={{ height: 0, opacity: 0 }}
              animate={{ height: 'auto', opacity: 1 }}
              exit={{ height: 0, opacity: 0 }}
              className="md:hidden border-t overflow-hidden"
            >
              <div className="px-4 py-3 space-y-2">
                <form onSubmit={handleSearch} className="relative">
                  <input
                    type="text"
                    placeholder="Tim kiem mon an..."
                    value={searchQuery}
                    onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
                    className="w-full pl-9 pr-4 py-2 text-sm border border-gray-200 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20"
                  />
                  <Search className="w-4 h-4 absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400" />
                </form>
                {allNavLinks.map((link) => (
                  <Link
                    key={link.to}
                    to={link.to}
                    className="block py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700"
                    onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(false)}
                  >
                    {link.label}
                  </Link>
                ))}
              </div>
            </motion.div>
          )}
        </AnimatePresence>
      </header>

      {/* Main content */}
      <main className="flex-1">
        <Outlet />
      </main>

      {/* Footer */}
      <footer className="bg-gray-900 text-gray-300 py-12 mt-auto">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4">
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
            <div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-4">
                <ChefHat className="w-8 h-8 text-primary" />
                <span className="text-xl font-bold text-white">Res-booking</span>
              </div>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">
                He thong dat mon va quan ly nha hang hien dai, nhanh chong va tien loi.
              </p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <h3 className="font-semibold text-white mb-3">Lien he</h3>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">Email: contact@resbooking.com</p>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">Dien thoai: 0123-456-789</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <h3 className="font-semibold text-white mb-3">Huong dan</h3>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">Ve chung toi</p>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">Chinh sach bao mat</p>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">Dieu khoan su dung</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="border-t border-gray-800 mt-8 pt-8 text-center text-sm text-gray-500">
            &copy; 2026 Res-booking. Tat ca quyen duoc bao luu.
          </div>
        </div>
      </footer>
    </div>
  )
}
```

```javascript
const express = require("express");
const router = express.Router();
const foodController = require("../controllers/food.controller");
const { verifyToken, restrictTo } = require("../middlewares/auth.middleware");

router.get("/", foodController.getFoods);
router.get("/:id", foodController.getFood);

router.post("/", verifyToken, restrictTo("admin"), foodController.createFood);
router.put("/:id", verifyToken, restrictTo("admin"), foodController.updateFood);
router.delete("/:id", verifyToken, restrictTo("admin"), foodController.deleteFood);

module.exports = router;

```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./\backend\src\controllers\auth.controller.js`

```text
     1→const jwt = require("jsonwebtoken");
     2→const { z } = require("zod");
     3→const User = require("../models/User.model");
     4→const asyncHandler = require("../utils/asyncHandler");
     5→const ApiResponse = require("../utils/ApiResponse");
     6→
     7→const generateAccessToken = (userId) =>
     8→  jwt.sign({ id: userId }, process.env.JWT_SECRET, { expiresIn: "1d" });
     9→
    10→const generateRefreshToken = (userId) =>
    11→  jwt.sign({ id: userId }, process.env.JWT_REFRESH_SECRET, { expiresIn: "7d" });
    12→
    13→const registerSchema = z.object({
    14→  name: z.string().min(2).max(100),
    15→  email: z.string().email(),
    16→  password: z.string().min(6),
    17→  phone: z.string().optional(),
    18→});
    19→
    20→const loginSchema = z.object({
    21→  email: z.string().email(),
    22→  password: z.string().min(1),
    23→});
    24→
    25→const register = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    26→  const { name, email, password, phone } = registerSchema.parse(req.body);
    27→
    28→  const existingUser = await User.findOne({ email: email.toLowerCase() });
    29→  if (existingUser) {
    30→    return res.status(409).json({ message: "Email already registered" });
    31→  }
    32→
    33→  const user = await User.create({
    34→    name,
    35→    email: email.toLowerCase(),
    36→    password,
    37→    phone,
    38→    role: "customer",
    39→  });
    40→
    41→  const accessToken = generateAccessToken(user._id);
    42→  const refreshToken = generateRefreshToken(user._id);
    43→
    44→  user.refreshToken = refreshToken;
    45→  await user.save();
    46→
    47→  return res
    48→    .status(201)
    49→    .json(
    50→      new ApiResponse(201, { user, accessToken, refreshToken }, "Registration successful")
    51→    );
    52→});
    53→
    54→const login = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    55→  const { email, password } = loginSchema.parse(req.body);
    56→
    57→  const user = await User.findOne({ email: email.toLowerCase() });
    58→  if (!user) {
    59→    return res.status(401).json({ message: "Invalid credentials" });
    60→  }
    61→
    62→  const isMatch = await user.comparePassword(password);
    63→  if (!isMatch) {
    64→    return res.status(401).json({ message: "Invalid credentials" });
    65→  }
    66→
    67→  const accessToken = generateAccessToken(user._id);
    68→  const refreshToken = generateRefreshToken(user._id);
    69→
    70→  user.refreshToken = refreshToken;
    71→  await user.save();
    72→
    73→  return res
    74→    .status(200)
    75→    .json(new ApiResponse(200, { user, accessToken, refreshToken }, "Login successful"));
    76→});
    77→
    78→const logout = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    79→  await User.findByIdAndUpdate(req.user._id, { refreshToken: null });
    80→  return res.status(200).json(new ApiResponse(200, null, "Logout successful"));
    81→});
    82→
    83→const refreshTokenHandler = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    84→  const { refreshToken } = req.body;
    85→  if (!refreshToken) {
    86→    return res.status(401).json({ message: "Refresh token required" });
    87→  }
    88→
    89→  try {
    90→    const decoded = jwt.verify(refreshToken, process.env.JWT_REFRESH_SECRET);
    91→    const user = await User.findById(decoded.id);
    92→    if (!user || user.refreshToken !== refreshToken) {
    93→      return res.status(401).json({ message: "Invalid refresh token" });
    94→    }
    95→
    96→    const newAccessToken = generateAccessToken(user._id);
    97→    const newRefreshToken = generateRefreshToken(user._id);
    98→
    99→    user.refreshToken = newRefreshToken;
   100→    await user.save();
   101→
   102→    return res
   103→      .status(200)
   104→      .json(new ApiResponse(200, { accessToken: newAccessToken, refreshToken: newRefreshToken }));
   105→  } catch {
   106→    return res.status(401).json({ message: "Invalid or expired refresh token" });
   107→  }
   108→});
   109→
   110→const getProfile = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   111→  const user = await User.findById(req.user._id).populate("wishlist");
   112→  return res.status(200).json(new ApiResponse(200, user));
   113→});
   114→
   115→const updateProfile = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   116→  const { name, phone, addresses } = req.body;
   117→  const user = await User.findById(req.user._id);
   118→
   119→  if (name) user.name = name;
   120→  if (phone) user.phone = phone;
   121→  if (addresses) user.addresses = addresses;
   122→
   123→  await user.save();
   124→  return res.status(200).json(new ApiResponse(200, user, "Profile updated"));
   125→});
   126→
   127→const changePassword = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   128→  const { oldPassword, newPassword } = req.body;
   129→  const user = await User.findById(req.user._id);
   130→
   131→  const isMatch = await user.comparePassword(oldPassword);
   132→  if (!isMatch) {
   133→    return res.status(400).json({ message: "Current password is incorrect" });
   134→  }
   135→
   136→  user.password = newPassword;
   137→  await user.save();
   138→
   139→  return res.status(200).json(new ApiResponse(200, null, "Password changed successfully"));
   140→});
   141→
   142→const getWishlist = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   143→  const user = await User.findById(req.user._id).populate("wishlist");
   144→  return res.status(200).json(new ApiResponse(200, user.wishlist));
   145→});
   146→
   147→const addToWishlist = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   148→  const { foodId } = req.params;
   149→  const user = await User.findById(req.user._id);
   150→
   151→  if (user.wishlist.includes(foodId)) {
   152→    return res.status(400).json({ message: "Food already in wishlist" });
   153→  }
   154→
   155→  user.wishlist.push(foodId);
   156→  await user.save();
   157→
   158→  return res.status(200).json(new ApiResponse(200, null, "Added to wishlist"));
   159→});
   160→
   161→const removeFromWishlist = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   162→  const { foodId } = req.params;
   163→  const user = await User.findById(req.user._id);
   164→
   165→  user.wishlist = user.wishlist.filter((id) => id.toString() !== foodId);
   166→  await user.save();
   167→
   168→  return res.status(200).json(new ApiResponse(200, null, "Removed from wishlist"));
   169→});
   170→
   171→module.exports = {
   172→  register,
   173→  login,
   174→  logout,
   175→  refreshTokenHandler,
   176→  getProfile,
   177→  updateProfile,
   178→  changePassword,
   179→  getWishlist,
   180→  addToWishlist,
   181→  removeFromWishlist,
   182→};
   183→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./\backend\src\controllers\admin.controller.js`

```text
     1→const User = require("../models/User.model");
     2→const Food = require("../models/Food.model");
     3→const Booking = require("../models/Booking.model");
     4→const { USER_ROLES } = require("../utils/constants");
     5→const asyncHandler = require("../utils/asyncHandler");
     6→const ApiResponse = require("../utils/ApiResponse");
     7→
     8→const getStats = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
     9→  const now = new Date();
    10→  const sevenDaysAgo = new Date(now.getTime() - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
    11→
    12→  const totalRevenue = await Booking.aggregate([
    13→    { $match: { status: { $nin: ["cancelled"] }, paymentStatus: "paid" } },
    14→    { $group: { _id: null, total: { $sum: "$total" } } },
    15→  ]);
    16→
    17→  const totalOrders = await Booking.countDocuments({ status: { $ne: "cancelled" } });
    18→  const totalUsers = await User.countDocuments({ role: USER_ROLES.CUSTOMER });
    19→  const totalFoods = await Food.countDocuments();
    20→
    21→  const topFoods = await Booking.aggregate([
    22→    { $unwind: "$items" },
    23→    { $group: { _id: "$items.food", name: { $first: "$items.name" }, totalSold: { $sum: "$items.quantity" } } },
    24→    { $sort: { totalSold: -1 } },
    25→    { $limit: 10 },
    26→    { $lookup: { from: "foods", localField: "_id", foreignField: "_id", as: "food" } },
    27→    { $unwind: "$food" },
    28→    { $project: { name: 1, totalSold: 1, image: "$food.images" } },
    29→  ]);
    30→
    31→  const ordersByStatus = await Booking.aggregate([
    32→    { $group: { _id: "$status", count: { $sum: 1 } } },
    33→  ]);
    34→
    35→  const revenueByDay = await Booking.aggregate([
    36→    { $match: { createdAt: { $gte: sevenDaysAgo }, status: { $nin: ["cancelled"] }, paymentStatus: "paid" } },
    37→    {
    38→      $group: {
    39→        _id: { $dateToString: { format: "%Y-%m-%d", date: "$createdAt" } },
    40→        revenue: { $sum: "$total" },
    41→        orders: { $sum: 1 },
    42→      },
    43→    },
    44→    { $sort: { _id: 1 } },
    45→  ]);
    46→
    47→  return res.status(200).json(
    48→    new ApiResponse(200, {
    49→      totalRevenue: totalRevenue[0]?.total || 0,
    50→      totalOrders,
    51→      totalUsers,
    52→      totalFoods,
    53→      topFoods,
    54→      ordersByStatus,
    55→      revenueByDay,
    56→    })
    57→  );
    58→});
    59→
    60→const getAllUsers = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    61→  const { page = 1, limit = 20, role } = req.query;
    62→  const query = {};
    63→  if (role) query.role = role;
    64→
    65→  const skip = (Number(page) - 1) * Number(limit);
    66→  const total = await User.countDocuments(query);
    67→  const users = await User.find(query).sort("-createdAt").skip(skip).limit(Number(limit));
    68→
    69→  return res.status(200).json(
    70→    new ApiResponse(200, {
    71→      users,
    72→      pagination: { total, page: Number(page), pages: Math.ceil(total / Number(limit)) },
    73→    })
    74→  );
    75→});
    76→
    77→const getShippers = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    78→  const shippers = await User.find({ role: USER_ROLES.SHIPPER }).select("name phone email avatar");
    79→  return res.status(200).json(new ApiResponse(200, shippers));
    80→});
    81→
    82→const getAllOrders = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    83→  const { page = 1, limit = 20, status } = req.query;
    84→  const query = {};
    85→  if (status) query.status = status;
    86→
    87→  const skip = (Number(page) - 1) * Number(limit);
    88→  const total = await Booking.countDocuments(query);
    89→  const orders = await Booking.find(query)
    90→    .sort("-createdAt")
    91→    .skip(skip)
    92→    .limit(Number(limit))
    93→    .populate("user", "name email phone")
    94→    .populate("items.food", "name images price")
    95→    .populate("shipper", "name phone");
    96→
    97→  return res.status(200).json(
    98→    new ApiResponse(200, {
    99→      orders,
   100→      pagination: { total, page: Number(page), pages: Math.ceil(total / Number(limit)) },
   101→    })
   102→  );
   103→});
   104→
   105→module.exports = {
   106→  getStats,
   107→  getAllUsers,
   108→  getShippers,
   109→  getAllOrders,
   110→};
   111→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./\backend\src\controllers\food.controller.js`

```text
     1→const Food = require("../models/Food.model");
     2→const asyncHandler = require("../utils/asyncHandler");
     3→const ApiResponse = require("../utils/ApiResponse");
     4→
     5→const getFoods = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
     6→  const {
     7→    search,
     8→    category,
     9→    sort = "-createdAt",
    10→    page = 1,
    11→    limit = 20,
    12→    featured,
    13→    minPrice,
    14→    maxPrice,
    15→  } = req.query;
    16→
    17→  const query = { isAvailable: true };
    18→
    19→  if (search) {
    20→    query.$text = { $search: search };
    21→  }
    22→  if (category) {
    23→    query.category = category;
    24→  }
    25→  if (featured === "true") {
    26→    query.isFeatured = true;
    27→  }
    28→  if (minPrice || maxPrice) {
    29→    query.price = {};
    30→    if (minPrice) query.price.$gte = Number(minPrice);
    31→    if (maxPrice) query.price.$lte = Number(maxPrice);
    32→  }
    33→
    34→  const skip = (Number(page) - 1) * Number(limit);
    35→  const total = await Food.countDocuments(query);
    36→  const foods = await Food.find(query)
    37→    .sort(sort)
    38→    .skip(skip)
    39→    .limit(Number(limit))
    40→    .populate("category", "name");
    41→
    42→  return res.status(200).json(
    43→    new ApiResponse(200, {
    44→      foods,
    45→      pagination: {
    46→        total,
    47→        page: Number(page),
    48→        pages: Math.ceil(total / Number(limit)),
    49→        limit: Number(limit),
    50→      },
    51→    })
    52→  );
    53→});
    54→
    55→const getFood = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    56→  const { id } = req.params;
    57→  const food = await Food.findById(id);
    58→  if (!food) {
    59→    return res.status(404).json({ message: "Food not found" });
    60→  }
    61→  return res.status(200).json(new ApiResponse(200, food));
    62→});
    63→
    64→const createFood = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    65→  const food = await Food.create(req.body);
    66→  return res.status(201).json(new ApiResponse(201, food, "Food created"));
    67→});
    68→
    69→const updateFood = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    70→  const { id } = req.params;
    71→  const food = await Food.findByIdAndUpdate(id, req.body, { new: true, runValidators: true });
    72→  if (!food) {
    73→    return res.status(404).json({ message: "Food not found" });
    74→  }
    75→  return res.status(200).json(new ApiResponse(200, food, "Food updated"));
    76→});
    77→
    78→const deleteFood = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    79→  const { id } = req.params;
    80→  const food = await Food.findByIdAndDelete(id);
    81→  if (!food) {
    82→    return res.status(404).json({ message: "Food not found" });
    83→  }
    84→  return res.status(200).json(new ApiResponse(200, null, "Food deleted"));
    85→});
    86→
    87→module.exports = {
    88→  getFoods,
    89→  getFood,
    90→  createFood,
    91→  updateFood,
    92→  deleteFood,
    93→};
    94→
```
</details></tool-use>

<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./\backend\src\controllers\coupon.controller.js`

```text
     1→const Coupon = require("../models/Coupon.model");
     2→const asyncHandler = require("../utils/asyncHandler");
     3→const ApiResponse = require("../utils/ApiResponse");
     4→
     5→const getCoupons = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
     6→  const coupons = await Coupon.find().sort("-createdAt");
     7→  return res.status(200).json(new ApiResponse(200, coupons));
     8→});
     9→
    10→const createCoupon = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    11→  const coupon = await Coupon.create(req.body);
    12→  return res.status(201).json(new ApiResponse(201, coupon, "Coupon created"));
    13→});
    14→
    15→const updateCoupon = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    16→  const { id } = req.params;
    17→  const coupon = await Coupon.findByIdAndUpdate(id, req.body, { new: true, runValidators: true });
    18→  if (!coupon) {
    19→    return res.status(404).json({ message: "Coupon not found" });
    20→  }
    21→  return res.status(200).json(new ApiResponse(200, coupon, "Coupon updated"));
    22→});
    23→
    24→const deleteCoupon = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    25→  const { id } = req.params;
    26→  const coupon = await Coupon.findByIdAndDelete(id);
    27→  if (!coupon) {
    28→    return res.status(404).json({ message: "Coupon not found" });
    29→  }
    30→  return res.status(200).json(new ApiResponse(200, null, "Coupon deleted"));
    31→});
    32→
    33→const validateCoupon = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    34→  const { code, subtotal } = req.body;
    35→
    36→  const coupon = await Coupon.findOne({ code: code.toUpperCase() });
    37→  if (!coupon) {
    38→    return res.status(404).json({ message: "Coupon not found" });
    39→  }
    40→
    41→  if (!coupon.isActive) {
    42→    return res.status(400).json({ message: "Coupon is not active" });
    43→  }
    44→
    45→  const now = new Date();
    46→  if (coupon.startDate > now) {
    47→    return res.status(400).json({ message: "Coupon is not yet valid" });
    48→  }
    49→  if (coupon.endDate < now) {
    50→    return res.status(400).json({ message: "Coupon has expired" });
    51→  }
    52→  if (coupon.usageLimit && coupon.usedCount >= coupon.usageLimit) {
    53→    return res.status(400).json({ message: "Coupon usage limit reached" });
    54→  }
    55→  if (subtotal && subtotal < coupon.minOrder) {
    56→    return res.status(400).json({ message: `Minimum order is ${coupon.minOrder}` });
    57→  }
    58→
    59→  let discountAmount = coupon.value;
    60→  if (coupon.type === "percent") {
    61→    discountAmount = (subtotal * coupon.value) / 100;
    62→    if (coupon.maxDiscount) discountAmount = Math.min(discountAmount, coupon.maxDiscount);
    63→  }
    64→
    65→  return res.status(200).json(
    66→    new ApiResponse(200, {
    67→      coupon,
    68→      discountAmount: Math.round(discountAmount),
    69→      freeShipping: coupon.freeShipping,
    70→    })
    71→  );
    72→});
    73→
    74→module.exports = {
    75→  getCoupons,
    76→  createCoupon,
    77→  updateCoupon,
    78→  deleteCoupon,
    79→  validateCoupon,
    80→};
    81→
```

 `./\backend\src\controllers\order.controller.js`

```text
     1→const Booking = require("../models/Booking.model");
     2→const Food = require("../models/Food.model");
     3→const Coupon = require("../models/Coupon.model");
     4→const Notification = require("../models/Notification.model");
     5→const { ORDER_STATUS } = require("../utils/constants");
     6→const asyncHandler = require("../utils/asyncHandler");
     7→const ApiResponse = require("../utils/ApiResponse");
     8→const { emitToUser, emitToAdmins } = require("../services/socket.service");
     9→
    10→const VALID_TRANSITIONS = {
    11→  [ORDER_STATUS.PENDING]: [ORDER_STATUS.CONFIRMED, ORDER_STATUS.CANCELLED],
    12→  [ORDER_STATUS.CONFIRMED]: [ORDER_STATUS.PREPARING, ORDER_STATUS.CANCELLED],
    13→  [ORDER_STATUS.PREPARING]: [ORDER_STATUS.PICKING, ORDER_STATUS.CANCELLED],
    14→  [ORDER_STATUS.PICKING]: [ORDER_STATUS.DELIVERING],
    15→  [ORDER_STATUS.DELIVERING]: [ORDER_STATUS.DELIVERED],
    16→  [ORDER_STATUS.DELIVERED]: [],
    17→  [ORDER_STATUS.CANCELLED]: [],
    18→};
    19→
    20→const createOrder = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    21→  const {
    22→    items,
    23→    fulfillmentType,
    24→    branch,
    25→    shippingAddress,
    26→    paymentMethod,
    27→    couponCode,
    28→    note,
    29→    estimatedDelivery,
    30→  } = req.body;
    31→
    32→  if (!items || items.length === 0) {
    33→    return res.status(400).json({ message: "Order must have at least one item" });
    34→  }
    35→
    36→  // Fetch foods and calculate subtotal
    37→  const foodIds = items.map((item) => item.food);
    38→  const foods = await Food.find({ _id: { $in: foodIds } });
    39→  const foodMap = {};
    40→  foods.forEach((f) => (foodMap[f._id.toString()] = f));
    41→
    42→  let subtotal = 0;
    43→  const orderItems = items.map((item) => {
    44→    const food = foodMap[item.food];
    45→    if (!food) throw new Error(`Food ${item.food} not found`);
    46→
    47→    let itemPrice = food.price;
    48→    if (item.variant) itemPrice += item.variant.price || 0;
    49→    const toppingsPrice = (item.toppings || []).reduce((sum, t) => sum + (t.price || 0), 0);
    50→    itemPrice += toppingsPrice;
    51→
    52→    const totalPrice = itemPrice * item.quantity;
    53→    subtotal += totalPrice;
    54→
    55→    // Update sold count
    56→    food.soldCount += item.quantity;
    57→    food.save();
    58→
    59→    return {
    60→      food: food._id,
    61→      name: food.name,
    62→      image: food.images?.[0] || "",
    63→      price: totalPrice / item.quantity,
    64→      quantity: item.quantity,
    65→      variant: item.variant,
    66→      toppings: item.toppings || [],
    67→      note: item.note,
    68→    };
    69→  });
    70→
    71→  // Apply coupon
    72→  let discountAmount = 0;
    73→  let coupon = null;
    74→  if (couponCode) {
    75→    coupon = await Coupon.findOne({ code: couponCode.toUpperCase(), isActive: true });
    76→    if (coupon) {
    77→      const now = new Date();
    78→      if (coupon.startDate <= now && coupon.endDate >= now) {
    79→        if (!coupon.usageLimit || coupon.usedCount < coupon.usageLimit) {
    80→          if (subtotal >= coupon.minOrder) {
    81→            if (coupon.type === "percent") {
    82→              discountAmount = (subtotal * coupon.value) / 100;
    83→              if (coupon.maxDiscount) discountAmount = Math.min(discountAmount, coupon.maxDiscount);
    84→            } else {
    85→              discountAmount = coupon.value;
    86→            }
    87→            coupon.usedCount += 1;
    88→            await coupon.save();
    89→          }
    90→        }
    91→      }
    92→    }
    93→  }
    94→
    95→  // Delivery fee
    96→  let deliveryFee = 0;
    97→  if (fulfillmentType === "delivery") {
    98→    deliveryFee = coupon?.freeShipping ? 0 : 15000;
    99→  }
   100→
   101→  const total = subtotal - discountAmount + deliveryFee;
   102→
   103→  // Generate order code
   104→  const timestamp = Date.now();
   105→  const seq = (await Booking.countDocuments()) + 1;
   106→  const orderCode = `ORD${timestamp}${seq}`;
   107→
   108→  const order = await Booking.create({
   109→    orderCode,
   110→    user: req.user._id,
   111→    items: orderItems,
   112→    subtotal,
   113→    discountAmount,
   114→    deliveryFee,
   115→    total,
   116→    fulfillmentType: fulfillmentType || "delivery",
   117→    branch,
   118→    shippingAddress,
   119→    paymentMethod: paymentMethod || "COD",
   120→    coupon: coupon?._id,
   121→    note,
   122→    estimatedDelivery,
   123→    status: ORDER_STATUS.PENDING,
   124→  });
   125→
   126→  // Notify admins
   127→  const populatedOrder = await Booking.findById(order._id)
   128→    .populate("user", "name email phone")
   129→    .populate("items.food", "name price images");
   130→
   131→  emitToAdmins("newOrder", { order: populatedOrder });
   132→
   133→  return res.status(201).json(new ApiResponse(201, order, "Order created successfully"));
   134→});
   135→
   136→const getMyOrders = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   137→  const { page = 1, limit = 10, status } = req.query;
   138→  const query = { user: req.user._id };
   139→  if (status) query.status = status;
   140→
   141→  const skip = (Number(page) - 1) * Number(limit);
   142→  const total = await Booking.countDocuments(query);
   143→  const orders = await Booking.find(query)
   144→    .sort("-createdAt")
   145→    .skip(skip)
   146→    .limit(Number(limit))
   147→    .populate("items.food", "name images price")
   148→    .populate("branch", "name address");
   149→
   150→  return res.status(200).json(
   151→    new ApiResponse(200, {
   152→      orders,
   153→      pagination: {
   154→        total,
   155→        page: Number(page),
   156→        pages: Math.ceil(total / Number(limit)),
   157→      },
   158→    })
   159→  );
   160→});
   161→
   162→const getOrderDetail = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   163→  const { id } = req.params;
   164→  const order = await Booking.findById(id)
   165→    .populate("user", "name email phone")
   166→    .populate("items.food", "name images price category")
   167→    .populate("branch", "name address phone")
   168→    .populate("shipper", "name phone")
   169→    .populate("coupon");
   170→
   171→  if (!order) {
   172→    return res.status(404).json({ message: "Order not found" });
   173→  }
   174→
   175→  if (order.user._id.toString() !== req.user._id.toString() && req.user.role !== "admin") {
   176→    return res.status(403).json({ message: "Access denied" });
   177→  }
   178→
   179→  return res.status(200).json(new ApiResponse(200, order));
   180→});
   181→
   182→const updateOrderStatus = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   183→  const { id } = req.params;
   184→  const { status } = req.body;
   185→
   186→  const order = await Booking.findById(id);
   187→  if (!order) {
   188→    return res.status(404).json({ message: "Order not found" });
   189→  }
   190→
   191→  const validNext = VALID_TRANSITIONS[order.status] || [];
   192→  if (!validNext.includes(status)) {
   193→    return res
   194→      .status(400)
   195→      .json({ message: `Cannot transition from ${order.status} to ${status}` });
   196→  }
   197→
   198→  order.status = status;
   199→  await order.save();
   200→
   201→  const populatedOrder = await Booking.findById(order._id)
   202→    .populate("user", "name email")
   203→    .populate("shipper", "name phone");
   204→
   205→  // Notify user
   206→  emitToUser(order.user.toString(), "orderStatusUpdate", {
   207→    orderId: order._id,
   208→    status: order.status,
   209→  });
   210→
   211→  // Notify shipper if assigned
   212→  if (order.shipper) {
   213→    emitToUser(order.shipper.toString(), "orderStatusUpdate", {
   214→      orderId: order._id,
   215→      status: order.status,
   216→    });
   217→  }
   218→
   219→  // Create notification
   220→  await Notification.create({
   221→    user: order.user,
   222→    type: "order",
   223→    title: "Order Status Updated",
   224→    message: `Your order ${order.orderCode} is now ${status}`,
   225→    data: { orderId: order._id, status },
   226→  });
   227→
   228→  return res.status(200).json(new ApiResponse(200, populatedOrder, "Order status updated"));
   229→});
   230→
   231→const assignShipper = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   232→  const { id } = req.params;
   233→  const { shipperId } = req.body;
   234→
   235→  const order = await Booking.findById(id);
   236→  if (!order) {
   237→    return res.status(404).json({ message: "Order not found" });
   238→  }
   239→
   240→  order.shipper = shipperId;
   241→  order.status = ORDER_STATUS.PICKING;
   242→  await order.save();
   243→
   244→  const populatedOrder = await Booking.findById(order._id).populate("shipper", "name phone");
   245→
   246→  emitToUser(shipperId, "newDelivery", { order: populatedOrder });
   247→
   248→  await Notification.create({
   249→    user: shipperId,
   250→    type: "order",
   251→    title: "New Delivery Assignment",
   252→    message: `You have been assigned to deliver order ${order.orderCode}`,
   253→    data: { orderId: order._id },
   254→  });
   255→
   256→  return res.status(200).json(new ApiResponse(200, populatedOrder, "Shipper assigned"));
   257→});
   258→
   259→const cancelOrder = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   260→  const { id } = req.params;
   261→  const order = await Booking.findById(id);
   262→
   263→  if (!order) {
   264→    return res.status(404).json({ message: "Order not found" });
   265→  }
   266→
   267→  if (order.user.toString() !== req.user._id.toString() && req.user.role !== "admin") {
   268→    return res.status(403).json({ message: "Access denied" });
   269→  }
   270→
   271→  const cancellable = [ORDER_STATUS.PENDING, ORDER_STATUS.CONFIRMED];
   272→  if (!cancellable.includes(order.status)) {
   273→    return res.status(400).json({ message: "Order cannot be cancelled at this stage" });
   274→  }
   275→
   276→  order.status = ORDER_STATUS.CANCELLED;
   277→  await order.save();
   278→
   279→  emitToUser(order.user.toString(), "orderCancelled", {
   280→    orderId: order._id,
   281→    orderCode: order.orderCode,
   282→  });
   283→
   284→  return res.status(200).json(new ApiResponse(200, null, "Order cancelled"));
   285→});
   286→
   287→module.exports = {
   288→  createOrder,
   289→  getMyOrders,
   290→  getOrderDetail,
   291→  updateOrderStatus,
   292→  assignShipper,
   293→  cancelOrder,
   294→};
   295→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-01 18:03:17Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```javascript
const express = require("express");
const router = express.Router();
const orderController = require("../controllers/order.controller");
const { verifyToken, restrictTo } = require("../middlewares/auth.middleware");

router.post("/", verifyToken, orderController.createOrder);
router.get("/my-orders", verifyToken, orderController.getMyOrders);
router.get("/:id", verifyToken, orderController.getOrderDetail);
router.patch("/:id/status", verifyToken, restrictTo("admin", "shipper"), orderController.updateOrderStatus);
router.post("/:id/shipper", verifyToken, restrictTo("admin"), orderController.assignShipper);
router.post("/:id/cancel", verifyToken, orderController.cancelOrder);

module.exports = router;

```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./\backend\src\controllers\review.controller.js`

```text
     1→const Review = require("../models/Review.model");
     2→const Booking = require("../models/Booking.model");
     3→const { ORDER_STATUS } = require("../utils/constants");
     4→const asyncHandler = require("../utils/asyncHandler");
     5→const ApiResponse = require("../utils/ApiResponse");
     6→
     7→const createReview = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
     8→  const { bookingId, foodId, rating, comment, images } = req.body;
     9→
    10→  const booking = await Booking.findById(bookingId);
    11→  if (!booking) {
    12→    return res.status(404).json({ message: "Booking not found" });
    13→  }
    14→
    15→  if (booking.user.toString() !== req.user._id.toString()) {
    16→    return res.status(403).json({ message: "Access denied" });
    17→  }
    18→
    19→  if (booking.status !== ORDER_STATUS.DELIVERED) {
    20→    return res.status(400).json({ message: "Can only review delivered orders" });
    21→  }
    22→
    23→  // Check if food is in this order
    24→  const foodInOrder = booking.items.some(
    25→    (item) => item.food.toString() === foodId
    26→  );
    27→  if (!foodInOrder) {
    28→    return res.status(400).json({ message: "Food not in this order" });
    29→  }
    30→
    31→  // Check if already reviewed
    32→  const existing = await Review.findOne({ user: req.user._id, booking: bookingId, food: foodId });
    33→  if (existing) {
    34→    return res.status(400).json({ message: "Already reviewed this food in this order" });
    35→  }
    36→
    37→  const review = await Review.create({
    38→    user: req.user._id,
    39→    booking: bookingId,
    40→    food: foodId,
    41→    rating,
    42→    comment,
    43→    images,
    44→  });
    45→
    46→  // Mark booking as reviewed
    47→  booking.review = review._id;
    48→  await booking.save();
    49→
    50→  const populated = await Review.findById(review._id).populate("user", "name avatar");
    51→
    52→  return res.status(201).json(new ApiResponse(201, populated, "Review created"));
    53→});
    54→
    55→const deleteReview = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    56→  const { id } = req.params;
    57→  const review = await Review.findById(id);
    58→
    59→  if (!review) {
    60→    return res.status(404).json({ message: "Review not found" });
    61→  }
    62→
    63→  if (review.user.toString() !== req.user._id.toString() && req.user.role !== "admin") {
    64→    return res.status(403).json({ message: "Access denied" });
    65→  }
    66→
    67→  await Booking.findByIdAndUpdate(review.booking, { review: null });
    68→  await review.deleteOne();
    69→
    70→  return res.status(200).json(new ApiResponse(200, null, "Review deleted"));
    71→});
    72→
    73→const getFoodReviews = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    74→  const { foodId } = req.params;
    75→  const { page = 1, limit = 10 } = req.query;
    76→
    77→  const skip = (Number(page) - 1) * Number(limit);
    78→  const total = await Review.countDocuments({ food: foodId });
    79→  const reviews = await Review.find({ food: foodId })
    80→    .sort("-createdAt")
    81→    .skip(skip)
    82→    .limit(Number(limit))
    83→    .populate("user", "name avatar");
    84→
    85→  return res.status(200).json(
    86→    new ApiResponse(200, {
    87→      reviews,
    88→      pagination: { total, page: Number(page), pages: Math.ceil(total / Number(limit)) },
    89→    })
    90→  );
    91→});
    92→
    93→module.exports = {
    94→  createReview,
    95→  deleteReview,
    96→  getFoodReviews,
    97→};
    98→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./\backend\src\controllers\notification.controller.js`

```text
     1→const Notification = require("../models/Notification.model");
     2→const asyncHandler = require("../utils/asyncHandler");
     3→const ApiResponse = require("../utils/ApiResponse");
     4→
     5→const getMyNotifications = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
     6→  const { page = 1, limit = 20 } = req.query;
     7→  const skip = (Number(page) - 1) * Number(limit);
     8→
     9→  const total = await Notification.countDocuments({ user: req.user._id });
    10→  const notifications = await Notification.find({ user: req.user._id })
    11→    .sort("-createdAt")
    12→    .skip(skip)
    13→    .limit(Number(limit));
    14→
    15→  const unreadCount = await Notification.countDocuments({
    16→    user: req.user._id,
    17→    isRead: false,
    18→  });
    19→
    20→  return res.status(200).json(
    21→    new ApiResponse(200, {
    22→      notifications,
    23→      unreadCount,
    24→      pagination: {
    25→        total,
    26→        page: Number(page),
    27→        pages: Math.ceil(total / Number(limit)),
    28→      },
    29→    })
    30→  );
    31→});
    32→
    33→const markAsRead = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    34→  const { id } = req.params;
    35→  const notification = await Notification.findOneAndUpdate(
    36→    { _id: id, user: req.user._id },
    37→    { isRead: true },
    38→    { new: true }
    39→  );
    40→
    41→  if (!notification) {
    42→    return res.status(404).json({ message: "Notification not found" });
    43→  }
    44→
    45→  return res.status(200).json(new ApiResponse(200, notification, "Marked as read"));
    46→});
    47→
    48→const markAllAsRead = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    49→  await Notification.updateMany({ user: req.user._id, isRead: false }, { isRead: true });
    50→  return res.status(200).json(new ApiResponse(200, null, "All notifications marked as read"));
    51→});
    52→
    53→module.exports = {
    54→  getMyNotifications,
    55→  markAsRead,
    56→  markAllAsRead,
    57→};
    58→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./\backend\src\controllers\upload.controller.js`

```text
     1→const multer = require("multer");
     2→const path = require("path");
     3→const asyncHandler = require("../utils/asyncHandler");
     4→const ApiResponse = require("../utils/ApiResponse");
     5→
     6→const storage = multer.diskStorage({
     7→  destination: (req, file, cb) => {
     8→    cb(null, path.join(__dirname, "../uploads"));
     9→  },
    10→  filename: (req, file, cb) => {
    11→    const uniqueSuffix = Date.now() + "-" + Math.round(Math.random() * 1e9);
    12→    const ext = path.extname(file.originalname);
    13→    cb(null, `${file.fieldname}-${uniqueSuffix}${ext}`);
    14→  },
    15→});
    16→
    17→const fileFilter = (req, file, cb) => {
    18→  const allowedTypes = /jpeg|jpg|png|webp|gif/;
    19→  const extname = allowedTypes.test(path.extname(file.originalname).toLowerCase());
    20→  const mimetype = allowedTypes.test(file.mimetype);
    21→  if (extname && mimetype) {
    22→    return cb(null, true);
    23→  }
    24→  cb(new Error("Only image files are allowed (jpeg, jpg, png, webp, gif)"));
    25→};
    26→
    27→const upload = multer({
    28→  storage,
    29→  fileFilter,
    30→  limits: { fileSize: 5 * 1024 * 1024 }, // 5MB
    31→});
    32→
    33→const uploadImage = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    34→  if (!req.file) {
    35→    return res.status(400).json({ message: "No file uploaded" });
    36→  }
    37→
    38→  const fileUrl = `/uploads/${req.file.filename}`;
    39→  return res.status(200).json(new ApiResponse(200, { url: fileUrl, filename: req.file.filename }, "File uploaded"));
    40→});
    41→
    42→module.exports = { upload, uploadImage };
    43→
```
</details></tool-use>

```javascript
const express = require("express");
const router = express.Router();
const couponController = require("../controllers/coupon.controller");
const { verifyToken, restrictTo } = require("../middlewares/auth.middleware");

router.get("/validate", couponController.validateCoupon);

router.get("/", verifyToken, restrictTo("admin"), couponController.getCoupons);
router.post("/", verifyToken, restrictTo("admin"), couponController.createCoupon);
router.put("/:id", verifyToken, restrictTo("admin"), couponController.updateCoupon);
router.delete("/:id", verifyToken, restrictTo("admin"), couponController.deleteCoupon);

module.exports = router;

```

```text
     1→import { useEffect } from 'react'
     2→import { Routes, Route } from 'react-router-dom'
     3→import { useDispatch } from 'react-redux'
     4→import { getCartFromStorage } from './slices/cartSlice'
     5→import { getProfile } from './slices/authSlice'
     6→import AppRoutes from './routes'
     7→
     8→function App() {
     9→  const dispatch = useDispatch()
    10→
    11→  useEffect(() => {
    12→    // Dark mode toggle
    13→    const isDark = localStorage.getItem('theme') === 'dark'
    14→    if (isDark) {
    15→      document.documentElement.classList.add('dark')
    16→    }
    17→
    18→    // Restore cart from localStorage
    19→    dispatch(getCartFromStorage())
    20→
    21→    // Restore user profile if token exists
    22→    const token = localStorage.getItem('accessToken')
    23→    if (token) {
    24→      dispatch(getProfile())
    25→    }
    26→  }, [dispatch])
    27→
    28→  return (
    29→    <Routes>
    30→      {AppRoutes()}
    31→    </Routes>
    32→  )
    33→}
    34→
    35→export default App
    36→
```

```text
     6→// User pages

     8→import FoodDetailPage from '../pages/FoodDetailPage'
     9→import CartPage from '../pages/CartPage'
    10→import CheckoutPage from '../pages/CheckoutPage'
    11→import LoginPage from '../pages/LoginPage'
    12→import RegisterPage from '../pages/RegisterPage'
    13→import RegisterAdminPage from '../pages/RegisterAdminPage'
    14→import RegisterShipperPage from '../pages/RegisterShipperPage'
    15→import ProfilePage from '../pages/ProfilePage'
    16→import OrderHistoryPage from '../pages/OrderHistoryPage'
    17→import OrderTrackingPage from '../pages/OrderTrackingPage'
    18→import WishlistPage from '../pages/WishlistPage'
    19→import NotificationsPage from '../pages/NotificationsPage'
    20→import NotFoundPage from '../pages/NotFoundPage'
    21→
    22→// Admin pages
    23→import AdminDashboardPage from '../pages/admin/AdminDashboardPage'
    24→import AdminFoodsPage from '../pages/admin/AdminFoodsPage'
    25→import AdminOrdersPage from '../pages/admin/AdminOrdersPage'
    26→import AdminUsersPage from '../pages/admin/AdminUsersPage'
    27→import AdminPromosPage from '../pages/admin/AdminPromosPage'
    28→import AdminBranchesPage from '../pages/admin/AdminBranchesPage'
    29→
    30→// Shipper pages
    31→import ShipperDashboardPage from '../pages/shipper/ShipperDashboardPage'
    32→import ShipperHistoryPage from '../pages/shipper/ShipperHistoryPage'
    33→
    34→// Route guards
    35→import ProtectedRoute from './ProtectedRoute'
    36→import AdminRoute from './AdminRoute'
    37→import ShipperRoute from './ShipperRoute'
    38→
    39→export default function AppRoutes() {
    40→  return (
    41→    <>
    42→      {/* Main routes */}
    43→      <Route path="/" element={<MainLayout />}>
    44→        <Route index element={<HomePage />} />
    45→        <Route path="food/:id" element={<FoodDetailPage />} />
    46→        <Route path="cart" element={<CartPage />} />
    47→        <Route path="checkout" element={<CheckoutPage />} />
    48→        <Route path="login" element={<LoginPage />} />
    49→        <Route path="register" element={<RegisterPage />} />
    50→        <Route path="register-admin" element={<RegisterAdminPage />} />
    51→        <Route path="register-shipper" element={<RegisterShipperPage />} />
    52→        <Route path="profile" element={<ProtectedRoute><ProfilePage /></ProtectedRoute>} />
    53→        <Route path="orders" element={<ProtectedRoute><OrderHistoryPage /></ProtectedRoute>} />
    54→        <Route path="orders/:id" element={<ProtectedRoute><OrderTrackingPage /></ProtectedRoute>} />
    55→        <Route path="wishlist" element={<ProtectedRoute><WishlistPage /></ProtectedRoute>} />
    56→        <Route path="notifications" element={<ProtectedRoute><NotificationsPage /></ProtectedRoute>} />
    57→        <Route path="*" element={<NotFoundPage />} />
    58→      </Route>
    59→    </>
    60→  )
    61→}
    62→
    63→function Route({ path, element, children }) {
    64→  return element
    65→}
    66→
    67→// Admin routes
    68→export function AdminRoutes() {
    69→  return (
    70→    <>
    71→      <Route path="admin" element={<AdminLayout />}>
    72→        <Route index element={<AdminDashboardPage />} />
    73→        <Route path="foods" element={<AdminFoodsPage />} />
    74→        <Route path="orders" element={<AdminOrdersPage />} />

    82→

    89→        <Route path="history" element={<ShipperHistoryPage />} />
```

```jsx
import { useState } from 'react'
import { Link, useLocation, Outlet, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'
import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux'
import { motion } from 'framer-motion'
import {
  LayoutDashboard,
  UtensilsCrossed,
  ShoppingBag,
  Users,
  Ticket,
  MapPin,
  Menu,
  X,
  LogOut,
  Bell,
  ChevronDown,
  ChefHat,
} from 'lucide-react'
import { logout } from '../slices/authSlice'
import { selectUnreadCount } from '../slices/notificationsSlice'

const sidebarLinks = [
  { to: '/admin', label: 'Dashboard', icon: LayoutDashboard, exact: true },
  { to: '/admin/foods', label: 'Mon an', icon: UtensilsCrossed },
  { to: '/admin/orders', label: 'Don hang', icon: ShoppingBag },
  { to: '/admin/users', label: 'Nguoi dung', icon: Users },
  { to: '/admin/promos', label: 'Ma giam gia', icon: Ticket },
  { to: '/admin/branches', label: 'Chi nhanh', icon: MapPin },
]

export default function AdminLayout() {
  const dispatch = useDispatch()
  const navigate = useNavigate()
  const location = useLocation()
  const { user } = useSelector((state) => state.auth)
  const unreadCount = useSelector(selectUnreadCount)
  const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(true)
  const [userMenuOpen, setUserMenuOpen] = useState(false)

  const handleLogout = () => {
    dispatch(logout())
    navigate('/login')
  }

  return (
    <div className="flex h-screen bg-gray-100">
      {/* Sidebar */}
      <aside
        className={`${
          sidebarOpen ? 'w-64' : 'w-20'
        } bg-gray-900 text-white flex-shrink-0 transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col`}
      >
        {/* Logo */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-gray-800">
          <Link to="/admin" className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <ChefHat className="w-8 h-8 text-primary flex-shrink-0" />
            {sidebarOpen && (
              <motion.span
                initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
                animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
                className="text-lg font-bold whitespace-nowrap"
              >
                Res-booking
              </motion.span>
            )}
          </Link>
          <button
            onClick={() => setSidebarOpen(!sidebarOpen)}
            className="p-1 rounded hover:bg-gray-800"
          >
            {sidebarOpen ? <X className="w-5 h-5" /> : <Menu className="w-5 h-5" />}
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Nav */}
        <nav className="flex-1 p-3 space-y-1 overflow-y-auto">
          {sidebarLinks.map((link) => {
            const isActive = link.exact
              ? location.pathname === link.to
              : location.pathname.startsWith(link.to)
            return (
              <Link
                key={link.to}
                to={link.to}
                className={`flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2.5 rounded-lg transition-colors ${
                  isActive
                    ? 'bg-primary text-white'
                    : 'text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-800 hover:text-white'
                }`}
              >
                <link.icon className="w-5 h-5 flex-shrink-0" />
                {sidebarOpen && (
                  <span className="text-sm font-medium whitespace-nowrap">{link.label}</span>
                )}
              </Link>
            )
          })}
        </nav>

        {/* User section */}
        <div className="p-3 border-t border-gray-800">
          <Link
            to="/"
            className="flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-800 rounded-lg mb-1"
          >
            <ChefHat className="w-5 h-5" />
            {sidebarOpen && <span className="text-sm whitespace-nowrap">Ve trang chu</span>}
          </Link>
        </div>
      </aside>

      {/* Main */}
      <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
        {/* Top header */}
        <header className="bg-white shadow-sm flex items-center justify-between px-6 h-16">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
            <button
              onClick={() => setSidebarOpen(!sidebarOpen)}
              className="p-2 text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700"
            >
              <Menu className="w-5 h-5" />
            </button>
            <h1 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-800">
              {sidebarLinks.find((l) =>
                l.exact ? location.pathname === l.to : location.pathname.startsWith(l.to)
              )?.label || 'Admin'}
            </h1>
          </div>

          <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
            <Link
              to="/notifications"
              className="relative p-2 text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700"
            >
              <Bell className="w-5 h-5" />
              {unreadCount > 0 && (
                <span className="absolute top-0 right-0 bg-red-500 text-white text-xs w-5 h-5 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                  {unreadCount > 9 ? '9+' : unreadCount}
                </span>
              )}
            </Link>

            <div className="relative">
              <button
                onClick={() => setUserMenuOpen(!userMenuOpen)}
                className="flex items-center gap-2 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-lg px-3 py-1.5"
              >
                <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-primary rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white font-medium">
                  {user?.name?.charAt(0)?.toUpperCase() || 'A'}
                </div>
                <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hidden sm:block">
                  {user?.name}
                </span>
                <ChevronDown className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" />
              </button>
              {userMenuOpen && (
                <div className="absolute right-0 mt-2 w-48 bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg border py-1 z-50">
                  <Link
                    to="/profile"
                    className="block px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50"
                    onClick={() => setUserMenuOpen(false)}
                  >
                    Tai khoan
                  </Link>
                  <hr className="my-1" />
                  <button
                    onClick={handleLogout}
                    className="w-full text-left px-4 py-2 text-sm text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50"
                  >
                    <LogOut className="w-4 h-4 inline mr-2" />
                    Dang xuat
                  </button>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </header>

        {/* Content */}
        <main className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6">
          <Outlet />
        </main>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```javascript
const express = require("express");
const helmet = require("helmet");
const cors = require("cors");
const path = require("path");

const authRoutes = require("./routes/auth.routes");
const foodRoutes = require("./routes/food.routes");
const orderRoutes = require("./routes/order.routes");
const couponRoutes = require("./routes/coupon.routes");
const branchRoutes = require("./routes/branch.routes");
const reviewRoutes = require("./routes/review.routes");
const notificationRoutes = require("./routes/notification.routes");
const adminRoutes = require("./routes/admin.routes");
const uploadRoutes = require("./routes/upload.routes");
const rateLimiter = require("./middlewares/rateLimiter.middleware");

const app = express();

// Security & Parsing middleware
app.use(helmet());
app.use(cors({ origin: process.env.CLIENT_URL || "*" }));
app.use(express.json({ limit: "10mb" }));
app.use(express.urlencoded({ extended: true, limit: "10mb" }));

// Serve uploaded files
app.use("/uploads", express.static(path.join(__dirname, "uploads")));

// Rate limiting
app.use(rateLimiter);

// API Routes
app.use("/api/auth", authRoutes);
app.use("/api/foods", foodRoutes);
app.use("/api/orders", orderRoutes);
app.use("/api/coupons", couponRoutes);
app.use("/api/branches", branchRoutes);
app.use("/api/reviews", reviewRoutes);
app.use("/api/notifications", notificationRoutes);
app.use("/api/admin", adminRoutes);
app.use("/api/upload", uploadRoutes);

// Health check
app.get("/api/health", (req, res) => {
  res.json({ status: "ok", timestamp: new Date().toISOString() });
});

// 404 handler
app.use((req, res) => {
  res.status(404).json({ message: "Route not found" });
});

// Global error handler
app.use((err, req, res, next) => {
  console.error(`[Error] ${err.message}`);

  if (err.name === "ZodError") {
    return res.status(400).json({
      message: "Validation error",
      errors: err.errors,
    });
  }

  if (err.message && err.message.includes("Only image files")) {
    return res.status(400).json({ message: err.message });
  }

  res.status(err.statusCode || 500).json({
    message: err.message || "Internal server error",
  });
});

module.exports = app;

```

```text
     1→import { createSlice, createAsyncThunk } from '@reduxjs/toolkit'
     2→import axiosClient from '../api/axiosClient'
     3→
     4→const initialState = {
     5→  user: JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('user') || 'null'),
     6→  accessToken: localStorage.getItem('accessToken') || null,
     7→  refreshToken: localStorage.getItem('refreshToken') || null,
     8→  isAuthenticated: !!localStorage.getItem('accessToken'),
     9→  loading: false,
    10→  error: null,
    11→}
    12→
    13→export const login = createAsyncThunk(
    14→  'auth/login',
    15→  async (credentials, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    16→    try {
    17→      const res = await axiosClient.post('/auth/login', credentials)
    18→      const { user, accessToken, refreshToken } = res.data.data
    19→      localStorage.setItem('accessToken', accessToken)
    20→      localStorage.setItem('refreshToken', refreshToken)
    21→      localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(user))
    22→      return { user, accessToken, refreshToken }
    23→    } catch (error) {
    24→      return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Login failed')
    25→    }
    26→  }
    27→)
    28→
    29→export const register = createAsyncThunk(
    30→  'auth/register',
    31→  async (data, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    32→    try {
    33→      const res = await axiosClient.post('/auth/register', data)
    34→      const { user, accessToken, refreshToken } = res.data.data
    35→      localStorage.setItem('accessToken', accessToken)
    36→      localStorage.setItem('refreshToken', refreshToken)
    37→      localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(user))
    38→      return { user, accessToken, refreshToken }
    39→    } catch (error) {
    40→      return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Registration failed')
    41→    }
    42→  }
    43→)
    44→
    45→export const logout = createAsyncThunk('auth/logout', async (_, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    46→  try {
    47→    await axiosClient.post('/auth/logout')
    48→  } catch (error) {
    49→    // ignore error on logout
    50→  } finally {
    51→    localStorage.removeItem('accessToken')
    52→    localStorage.removeItem('refreshToken')
    53→    localStorage.removeItem('user')
    54→  }
    55→})
    56→
    57→export const refreshTokenAsync = createAsyncThunk(
    58→  'auth/refreshToken',
    59→  async (_, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    60→    try {
    61→      const refreshToken = localStorage.getItem('refreshToken')
    62→      const res = await axiosClient.post('/auth/refresh-token', {}, {
    63→        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${refreshToken}` },
    64→      })
    65→      const { accessToken, refreshToken: newRefreshToken } = res.data.data
    66→      localStorage.setItem('accessToken', accessToken)
    67→      localStorage.setItem('refreshToken', newRefreshToken)
    68→      return { accessToken, refreshToken: newRefreshToken }
    69→    } catch (error) {
    70→      localStorage.removeItem('accessToken')
    71→      localStorage.removeItem('refreshToken')
    72→      localStorage.removeItem('user')
    73→      return rejectWithValue('Session expired')
    74→    }
    75→  }
    76→)
    77→
    78→export const getProfile = createAsyncThunk(
    79→  'auth/getProfile',
    80→  async (_, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    81→    try {
    82→      const res = await axiosClient.get('/auth/profile')
    83→      const user = res.data.data
    84→      localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(user))
    85→      return user
    86→    } catch (error) {
    87→      return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to get profile')
    88→    }
    89→  }
    90→)
    91→
    92→export const updateProfile = createAsyncThunk(
    93→  'auth/updateProfile',
    94→  async (data, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    95→    try {
    96→      const res = await axiosClient.put('/auth/profile', data)
    97→      const user = res.data.data
    98→      localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(user))
    99→      return user
   100→    } catch (error) {
   101→      return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to update profile')
   102→    }
   103→  }
   104→)
   105→
   106→export const changePassword = createAsyncThunk(
   107→  'auth/changePassword',
   108→  async (data, { rejectWithValue }) => {
   109→    try {
   110→      await axiosClient.post('/auth/change-password', data)
   111→      return true
   112→    } catch (error) {
   113→      return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to change password')
   114→    }
   115→  }
   116→)
   117→
   118→const authSlice = createSlice({
   119→  name: 'auth',
   120→  initialState,
   121→  reducers: {
   122→    clearError: (state) => {
   123→      state.error = null
   124→    },
   125→  },
   126→  extraReducers: (builder) => {
   127→    // Login
   128→    builder.addCase(login.pending, (state) => {
   129→      state.loading = true
   130→      state.error = null
   131→    })
   132→    builder.addCase(login.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   133→      state.loading = false
   134→      state.user = action.payload.user
   135→      state.accessToken = action.payload.accessToken
   136→      state.refreshToken = action.payload.refreshToken
   137→      state.isAuthenticated = true
   138→    })
   139→    builder.addCase(login.rejected, (state, action) => {
   140→      state.loading = false
   141→      state.error = action.payload
   142→    })
   143→
   144→    // Register
   145→    builder.addCase(register.pending, (state) => {
   146→      state.loading = true
   147→      state.error = null
   148→    })
   149→    builder.addCase(register.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   150→      state.loading = false
   151→      state.user = action.payload.user
   152→      state.accessToken = action.payload.accessToken
   153→      state.refreshToken = action.payload.refreshToken
   154→      state.isAuthenticated = true
   155→    })
   156→    builder.addCase(register.rejected, (state, action) => {
   157→      state.loading = false
   158→      state.error = action.payload
   159→    })
   160→
   161→    // Logout
   162→    builder.addCase(logout.fulfilled, (state) => {
   163→      state.user = null
   164→      state.accessToken = null
   165→      state.refreshToken = null
   166→      state.isAuthenticated = false
   167→    })
   168→
   169→    // Refresh Token
   170→    builder.addCase(refreshTokenAsync.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   171→      state.accessToken = action.payload.accessToken
   172→      state.refreshToken = action.payload.refreshToken
   173→    })
   174→
   175→    // Get Profile
   176→    builder.addCase(getProfile.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   177→      state.user = action.payload
   178→      state.isAuthenticated = true
   179→    })
   180→
   181→    // Update Profile
   182→    builder.addCase(updateProfile.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   183→      state.user = action.payload
   184→    })
   185→
   186→    // Change Password
   187→    builder.addCase(changePassword.fulfilled, (state) => {
   188→      // success
   189→    })
   190→  },
   191→})
   192→
   193→export const { clearError } = authSlice.actions
   194→export default authSlice.reducer
   195→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./\frontend\src\slices\cartSlice.js`

```text
     1→import { createSlice } from '@reduxjs/toolkit'
     2→
     3→const CART_STORAGE_KEY = 'res_booking_cart'
     4→
     5→const loadCartFromStorage = () => {
     6→  try {
     7→    const stored = localStorage.getItem(CART_STORAGE_KEY)
     8→    return stored ? JSON.parse(stored) : { items: [], deliveryFee: 0, coupon: null }
     9→  } catch {
    10→    return { items: [], deliveryFee: 0, coupon: null }
    11→  }
    12→}
    13→
    14→const saveCartToStorage = (cart) => {
    15→  try {
    16→    localStorage.setItem(CART_STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(cart))
    17→  } catch {
    18→    // ignore
    19→  }
    20→}
    21→
    22→const initialState = loadCartFromStorage()
    23→
    24→const cartSlice = createSlice({
    25→  name: 'cart',
    26→  initialState,
    27→  reducers: {
    28→    getCartFromStorage: (state) => {
    29→      const stored = loadCartFromStorage()
    30→      state.items = stored.items || []
    31→      state.deliveryFee = stored.deliveryFee || 0
    32→      state.coupon = stored.coupon || null
    33→    },
    34→    addItem: (state, action) => {
    35→      const { food, quantity, variant, toppings = [] } = action.payload
    36→      const variantStr = variant ? JSON.stringify(variant) : ''
    37→      const toppingsStr = JSON.stringify(toppings.sort((a, b) => a._id.localeCompare(b._id)))
    38→
    39→      const existingIndex = state.items.findIndex(
    40→        (item) =>
    41→          item.food._id === food._id &&
    42→          item.variantStr === variantStr &&
    43→          item.toppingsStr === toppingsStr
    44→      )
    45→
    46→      if (existingIndex >= 0) {
    47→        state.items[existingIndex].quantity += quantity
    48→      } else {
    49→        state.items.push({ food, quantity, variant, toppings, variantStr, toppingsStr })
    50→      }
    51→      saveCartToStorage(state)
    52→    },
    53→    removeItem: (state, action) => {
    54→      const index = action.payload
    55→      state.items.splice(index, 1)
    56→      saveCartToStorage(state)
    57→    },
    58→    updateQuantity: (state, action) => {
    59→      const { index, quantity } = action.payload
    60→      if (quantity <= 0) {
    61→        state.items.splice(index, 1)
    62→      } else {
    63→        state.items[index].quantity = quantity
    64→      }
    65→      saveCartToStorage(state)
    66→    },
    67→    clearCart: (state) => {
    68→      state.items = []
    69→      state.coupon = null
    70→      state.deliveryFee = 0
    71→      saveCartToStorage(state)
    72→    },
    73→    setCoupon: (state, action) => {
    74→      state.coupon = action.payload
    75→      saveCartToStorage(state)
    76→    },
    77→    setDeliveryFee: (state, action) => {
    78→      state.deliveryFee = action.payload
    79→      saveCartToStorage(state)
    80→    },
    81→  },
    82→})
    83→
    84→export const {
    85→  getCartFromStorage,
    86→  addItem,
    87→  removeItem,
    88→  updateQuantity,
    89→  clearCart,
    90→  setCoupon,
    91→  setDeliveryFee,
    92→} = cartSlice.actions
    93→
    94→// Selectors
    95→export const selectCartItems = (state) => state.cart.items
    96→export const selectCartTotal = (state) =>
    97→  state.cart.items.reduce((sum, item) => {
    98→    const variantPrice = item.variant?.price || 0
    99→    const toppingsPrice = item.toppings.reduce((t, tp) => t + (tp.price || 0), 0)
   100→    return sum + (item.food.price + variantPrice + toppingsPrice) * item.quantity
   101→  }, 0)
   102→export const selectCartCount = (state) =>
   103→  state.cart.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0)
   104→
   105→export default cartSlice.reducer
   106→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
