<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./\frontend\src\layouts\MainLayout.jsx`

```text
     1→import { useState } from 'react'
     2→import { Link, useNavigate, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom'
     3→import { Outlet } from 'react-router-dom'
     4→import { useSelector, useDispatch } from 'react-redux'
     5→import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion'
     6→import {
     7→  ShoppingCart,
     8→  User,
     9→  Menu,
    10→  X,
    11→  Heart,
    12→  Bell,
    13→  LogOut,
    14→  ChefHat,
    15→  Truck,
    16→  LayoutDashboard,
    17→  Search,
    18→} from 'lucide-react'
    19→import { logout } from '../slices/authSlice'
    20→import { selectCartCount } from '../slices/cartSlice'
    21→import { selectUnreadCount } from '../slices/notificationsSlice'
    22→
    23→export default function MainLayout() {
    24→  const dispatch = useDispatch()
    25→  const navigate = useNavigate()
    26→  const location = useLocation()
    27→
    28→  const { user, isAuthenticated } = useSelector((state) => state.auth)
    29→  const cartCount = useSelector(selectCartCount)
    30→  const unreadCount = useSelector(selectUnreadCount)
    31→
    32→  const [mobileMenuOpen, setMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false)
    33→  const [userMenuOpen, setUserMenuOpen] = useState(false)
    34→  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('')
    35→
    36→  const handleLogout = () => {
    37→    dispatch(logout())
    38→    setUserMenuOpen(false)
    39→    navigate('/')
    40→  }
    41→
    42→  const handleSearch = (e) => {
    43→    e.preventDefault()
    44→    if (searchQuery.trim()) {
    45→      navigate(`/?search=${encodeURIComponent(searchQuery.trim())}`)
    46→      setSearchQuery('')
    47→    }
    48→  }
    49→
    50→  const navLinks = [
    51→    { to: '/', label: 'Trang chu' },
    52→    { to: '/cart', label: 'Gio hang' },
    53→  ]
    54→
    55→  const adminLink = isAuthenticated && user?.role === 'admin'
    56→    ? { to: '/admin', label: 'Quan ly', icon: LayoutDashboard }
    57→    : null
    58→
    59→  const shipperLink = isAuthenticated && user?.role === 'shipper'
    60→    ? { to: '/shipper', label: 'Shipper', icon: Truck }
    61→    : null
    62→
    63→  const allNavLinks = [...navLinks]
    64→  if (adminLink) allNavLinks.push(adminLink)
    65→  if (shipperLink) allNavLinks.push(shipperLink)
    66→
    67→  return (
    68→    <div className="min-h-screen flex flex-col bg-gray-50">
    69→      {/* Header */}
    70→      <header className="bg-white shadow-sm sticky top-0 z-50">
    71→        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4">
    72→          <div className="flex items-center justify-between h-16">
    73→            {/* Logo */}
    74→            <Link to="/" className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-shrink-0">
    75→              <ChefHat className="w-8 h-8 text-primary" />
    76→              <span className="text-xl font-bold text-primary">Res-booking</span>
    77→            </Link>
    78→
    79→            {/* Desktop Nav */}
    80→            <nav className="hidden md:flex items-center gap-6">
    81→              {allNavLinks.map((link) => (
    82→                <Link
    83→                  key={link.to}
    84→                  to={link.to}
    85→                  className={`text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
    86→                    location.pathname === link.to
    87→                      ? 'text-primary'
    88→                      : 'text-gray-600 hover:text-primary'
    89→                  }`}
    90→                >
    91→                  {link.icon && <link.icon className="w-4 h-4 inline mr-1" />}
    92→                  {link.label}
    93→                </Link>
    94→              ))}
    95→            </nav>
    96→
    97→            {/* Right side */}
    98→            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
    99→              {/* Search */}
   100→              <form onSubmit={handleSearch} className="hidden md:block relative">
   101→                <input
   102→                  type="text"
   103→                  placeholder="Tim kiem mon an..."
   104→                  value={searchQuery}
   105→                  onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
   106→                  className="pl-9 pr-4 py-2 text-sm border border-gray-200 rounded-full focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary w-64"
   107→                />
   108→                <Search className="w-4 h-4 absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400" />
   109→              </form>
   110→
   111→              {/* Cart */}
   112→              <Link
   113→                to="/cart"
   114→                className="relative p-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-primary transition-colors"
   115→              >
   116→                <ShoppingCart className="w-5 h-5" />
   117→                {cartCount > 0 && (
   118→                  <span className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 bg-primary text-white text-xs w-5 h-5 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center font-medium">
   119→                    {cartCount > 9 ? '9+' : cartCount}
   120→                  </span>
   121→                )}
   122→              </Link>
   123→
   124→              {/* Wishlist */}
   125→              {isAuthenticated && (
   126→                <Link
   127→                  to="/wishlist"
   128→                  className="p-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-primary transition-colors"
   129→                >
   130→                  <Heart className="w-5 h-5" />
   131→                </Link>
   132→              )}
   133→
   134→              {/* Notifications */}
   135→              {isAuthenticated && (
   136→                <Link
   137→                  to="/notifications"
   138→                  className="relative p-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-primary transition-colors"
   139→                >
   140→                  <Bell className="w-5 h-5" />
   141→                  {unreadCount > 0 && (
   142→                    <span className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 bg-red-500 text-white text-xs w-5 h-5 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center font-medium">
   143→                      {unreadCount > 9 ? '9+' : unreadCount}
   144→                    </span>
   145→                  )}
   146→                </Link>
   147→              )}
   148→
   149→              {/* User Menu */}
   150→              {isAuthenticated ? (
   151→                <div className="relative">
   152→                  <button
   153→                    onClick={() => setUserMenuOpen(!userMenuOpen)}
   154→                    className="flex items-center gap-2 p-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-primary transition-colors"
   155→                  >
   156→                    <User className="w-5 h-5" />
   157→                    <span className="hidden md:block text-sm font-medium">{user?.name}</span>
   158→                  </button>
   159→                  <AnimatePresence>
   160→                    {userMenuOpen && (
   161→                      <motion.div
   162→                        initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 8 }}
   163→                        animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
   164→                        exit={{ opacity: 0, y: 8 }}
   165→                        className="absolute right-0 mt-2 w-48 bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg border py-1 z-50"
   166→                      >
   167→                        <Link
   168→                          to="/profile"
   169→                          className="block px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50"
   170→                          onClick={() => setUserMenuOpen(false)}
   171→                        >
   172→                          <User className="w-4 h-4 inline mr-2" />
   173→                          Tai khoan
   174→                        </Link>
   175→                        <Link
   176→                          to="/orders"
   177→                          className="block px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50"
   178→                          onClick={() => setUserMenuOpen(false)}
   179→                        >
   180→                          Don hang cua toi
   181→                        </Link>
   182→                        {(user?.role === 'admin' || user?.role === 'manager') && (
   183→                          <Link
   184→                            to="/admin"
   185→                            className="block px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50"
   186→                            onClick={() => setUserMenuOpen(false)}
   187→                          >
   188→                            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4 inline mr-2" />
   189→                            Quan ly
   190→                          </Link>
   191→                        )}
   192→                        {user?.role === 'shipper' && (
   193→                          <Link
   194→                            to="/shipper"
   195→                            className="block px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50"
   196→                            onClick={() => setUserMenuOpen(false)}
   197→                          >
   198→                            <Truck className="w-4 h-4 inline mr-2" />
   199→                            Shipper
   200→                          </Link>
   201→                        )}
   202→                        <hr className="my-1" />
   203→                        <button
   204→                          onClick={handleLogout}
   205→                          className="w-full text-left px-4 py-2 text-sm text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50"
   206→                        >
   207→                          <LogOut className="w-4 h-4 inline mr-2" />
   208→                          Dang xuat
   209→                        </button>
   210→                      </motion.div>
   211→                    )}
   212→                  </AnimatePresence>
   213→                </div>
   214→              ) : (
   215→                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   216→                  <Link
   217→                    to="/login"
   218→                    className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600 hover:text-primary transition-colors"
   219→                  >
   220→                    Dang nhap
   221→                  </Link>
   222→                  <Link
   223→                    to="/register"
   224→                    className="px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium bg-primary text-white rounded-full hover:bg-primary-dark transition-colors"
   225→                  >
   226→                    Dang ky
   227→                  </Link>
   228→                </div>
   229→              )}
   230→
   231→              {/* Mobile menu toggle */}
   232→              <button
   233→                onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(!mobileMenuOpen)}
   234→                className="md:hidden p-2 text-gray-600"
   235→              >
   236→                {mobileMenuOpen ? <X className="w-5 h-5" /> : <Menu className="w-5 h-5" />}
   237→              </button>
   238→            </div>
   239→          </div>
   240→        </div>
   241→
   242→        {/* Mobile menu */}
   243→        <AnimatePresence>
   244→          {mobileMenuOpen && (
   245→            <motion.div
   246→              initial={{ height: 0, opacity: 0 }}
   247→              animate={{ height: 'auto', opacity: 1 }}
   248→              exit={{ height: 0, opacity: 0 }}
   249→              className="md:hidden border-t overflow-hidden"
   250→            >
   251→              <div className="px-4 py-3 space-y-2">
   252→                <form onSubmit={handleSearch} className="relative">
   253→                  <input
   254→                    type="text"
   255→                    placeholder="Tim kiem mon an..."
   256→                    value={searchQuery}
   257→                    onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
   258→                    className="w-full pl-9 pr-4 py-2 text-sm border border-gray-200 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20"
   259→                  />
   260→                  <Search className="w-4 h-4 absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400" />
   261→                </form>
   262→                {allNavLinks.map((link) => (
   263→                  <Link
   264→                    key={link.to}
   265→                    to={link.to}
   266→                    className="block py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700"
   267→                    onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(false)}
   268→                  >
   269→                    {link.label}
   270→                  </Link>
   271→                ))}
   272→              </div>
   273→            </motion.div>
   274→          )}
   275→        </AnimatePresence>
   276→      </header>
   277→
   278→      {/* Main content */}
   279→      <main className="flex-1">
   280→        <Outlet />
   281→      </main>
   282→
   283→      {/* Footer */}
   284→      <footer className="bg-gray-900 text-gray-300 py-12 mt-auto">
   285→        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4">
   286→          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
   287→            <div>
   288→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-4">
   289→                <ChefHat className="w-8 h-8 text-primary" />
   290→                <span className="text-xl font-bold text-white">Res-booking</span>
   291→              </div>
   292→              <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">
   293→                He thong dat mon va quan ly nha hang hien dai, nhanh chong va tien loi.
   294→              </p>
   295→            </div>
   296→            <div>
   297→              <h3 className="font-semibold text-white mb-3">Lien he</h3>
   298→              <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">Email: contact@resbooking.com</p>
   299→              <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">Dien thoai: 0123-456-789</p>
   300→            </div>
   301→            <div>
   302→              <h3 className="font-semibold text-white mb-3">Huong dan</h3>
   303→              <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">Ve chung toi</p>
   304→              <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">Chinh sach bao mat</p>
   305→              <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">Dieu khoan su dung</p>
   306→            </div>
   307→          </div>
   308→          <div className="border-t border-gray-800 mt-8 pt-8 text-center text-sm text-gray-500">
   309→            &copy; 2026 Res-booking. Tat ca quyen duoc bao luu.
   310→          </div>
   311→        </div>
   312→      </footer>
   313→    </div>
   314→  )
   315→}
   316→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { useState } from 'react'
     2→import { Link, useLocation, Outlet, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'
     3→import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux'
     4→import { motion } from 'framer-motion'
     5→import {
     6→  LayoutDashboard,
     7→  UtensilsCrossed,
     8→  ShoppingBag,
     9→  Users,
    10→  Ticket,
    11→  MapPin,
    12→  Menu,
    13→  X,
    14→  LogOut,
    15→  Bell,
    16→  ChevronDown,
    17→  ChefHat,
    18→} from 'lucide-react'
    19→import { logout } from '../slices/authSlice'
    20→import { selectUnreadCount } from '../slices/notificationsSlice'
    21→
    22→const sidebarLinks = [
    23→  { to: '/admin', label: 'Dashboard', icon: LayoutDashboard, exact: true },
    24→  { to: '/admin/foods', label: 'Mon an', icon: UtensilsCrossed },
    25→  { to: '/admin/orders', label: 'Don hang', icon: ShoppingBag },
    26→  { to: '/admin/users', label: 'Nguoi dung', icon: Users },
    27→  { to: '/admin/promos', label: 'Ma giam gia', icon: Ticket },
    28→  { to: '/admin/branches', label: 'Chi nhanh', icon: MapPin },
    29→]
    30→
    31→export default function AdminLayout() {
    32→  const dispatch = useDispatch()
    33→  const navigate = useNavigate()
    34→  const location = useLocation()
    35→  const { user } = useSelector((state) => state.auth)
    36→  const unreadCount = useSelector(selectUnreadCount)
    37→  const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(true)
    38→  const [userMenuOpen, setUserMenuOpen] = useState(false)
    39→
    40→  const handleLogout = () => {
    41→    dispatch(logout())
    42→    navigate('/login')
    43→  }
    44→
    45→  return (
    46→    <div className="flex h-screen bg-gray-100">
    47→      {/* Sidebar */}
    48→      <aside
    49→        className={`${
    50→          sidebarOpen ? 'w-64' : 'w-20'
    51→        } bg-gray-900 text-white flex-shrink-0 transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col`}
    52→      >
    53→        {/* Logo */}
    54→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-gray-800">
    55→          <Link to="/admin" className="flex items-center gap-2">
    56→            <ChefHat className="w-8 h-8 text-primary flex-shrink-0" />
    57→            {sidebarOpen && (
    58→              <motion.span
    59→                initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
    60→                animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
    61→                className="text-lg font-bold whitespace-nowrap"
    62→              >
    63→                Res-booking
    64→              </motion.span>
    65→            )}
    66→          </Link>
    67→          <button
    68→            onClick={() => setSidebarOpen(!sidebarOpen)}
    69→            className="p-1 rounded hover:bg-gray-800"
    70→          >
    71→            {sidebarOpen ? <X className="w-5 h-5" /> : <Menu className="w-5 h-5" />}
    72→          </button>
    73→        </div>
    74→
    75→        {/* Nav */}
    76→        <nav className="flex-1 p-3 space-y-1 overflow-y-auto">
    77→          {sidebarLinks.map((link) => {
    78→            const isActive = link.exact
    79→              ? location.pathname === link.to
    80→              : location.pathname.startsWith(link.to)
    81→            return (
    82→              <Link
    83→                key={link.to}
    84→                to={link.to}
    85→                className={`flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2.5 rounded-lg transition-colors ${
    86→                  isActive
    87→                    ? 'bg-primary text-white'
    88→                    : 'text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-800 hover:text-white'
    89→                }`}
    90→              >
    91→                <link.icon className="w-5 h-5 flex-shrink-0" />
    92→                {sidebarOpen && (
    93→                  <span className="text-sm font-medium whitespace-nowrap">{link.label}</span>
    94→                )}
    95→              </Link>
    96→            )
    97→          })}
    98→        </nav>
    99→
   100→        {/* User section */}
   101→        <div className="p-3 border-t border-gray-800">
   102→          <Link
   103→            to="/"
   104→            className="flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-800 rounded-lg mb-1"
   105→          >
   106→            <ChefHat className="w-5 h-5" />
   107→            {sidebarOpen && <span className="text-sm whitespace-nowrap">Ve trang chu</span>}
   108→          </Link>
   109→        </div>
   110→      </aside>
   111→
   112→      {/* Main */}
   113→      <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
   114→        {/* Top header */}
   115→        <header className="bg-white shadow-sm flex items-center justify-between px-6 h-16">
   116→          <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
   117→            <button
   118→              onClick={() => setSidebarOpen(!sidebarOpen)}
   119→              className="p-2 text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700"
   120→            >
   121→              <Menu className="w-5 h-5" />
   122→            </button>
   123→            <h1 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-800">
   124→              {sidebarLinks.find((l) =>
   125→                l.exact ? location.pathname === l.to : location.pathname.startsWith(l.to)
   126→              )?.label || 'Admin'}
   127→            </h1>
   128→          </div>
   129→
   130→          <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
   131→            <Link
   132→              to="/notifications"
   133→              className="relative p-2 text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700"
   134→            >
   135→              <Bell className="w-5 h-5" />
   136→              {unreadCount > 0 && (
   137→                <span className="absolute top-0 right-0 bg-red-500 text-white text-xs w-5 h-5 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
   138→                  {unreadCount > 9 ? '9+' : unreadCount}
   139→                </span>
   140→              )}
   141→            </Link>
   142→
   143→            <div className="relative">
   144→              <button
   145→                onClick={() => setUserMenuOpen(!userMenuOpen)}
   146→                className="flex items-center gap-2 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-lg px-3 py-1.5"
   147→              >
   148→                <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-primary rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white font-medium">
   149→                  {user?.name?.charAt(0)?.toUpperCase() || 'A'}
   150→                </div>
   151→                <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hidden sm:block">
   152→                  {user?.name}
   153→                </span>
   154→                <ChevronDown className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" />
   155→              </button>
   156→              {userMenuOpen && (
   157→                <div className="absolute right-0 mt-2 w-48 bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg border py-1 z-50">
   158→                  <Link
   159→                    to="/profile"
   160→                    className="block px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50"
   161→                    onClick={() => setUserMenuOpen(false)}
   162→                  >
   163→                    Tai khoan
   164→                  </Link>
   165→                  <hr className="my-1" />
   166→                  <button
   167→                    onClick={handleLogout}
   168→                    className="w-full text-left px-4 py-2 text-sm text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50"
   169→                  >
   170→                    <LogOut className="w-4 h-4 inline mr-2" />
   171→                    Dang xuat
   172→                  </button>
   173→                </div>
   174→              )}
   175→            </div>
   176→          </div>
   177→        </header>
   178→
   179→        {/* Content */}
   180→        <main className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6">
   181→          <Outlet />
   182→        </main>
   183→      </div>
   184→    </div>
   185→  )
   186→}
   187→
```

```text
   149→            </div>
   150→          </div>
   151→        </header>
   152→
   153→        {/* Content */}
   154→        <main className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6">
   155→          <Outlet />
   156→        </main>
   157→      </div>
   158→    </div>
   159→  )
   160→}

```

```text
     1→import { Navigate, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom'
     2→import { useSelector } from 'react-redux'
     3→
     4→export default function ProtectedRoute({ children }) {
     5→  const { isAuthenticated } = useSelector((state) => state.auth)
     6→  const location = useLocation()
     7→
     8→  if (!isAuthenticated) {
     9→    return <Navigate to="/login" state={{ from: location }} replace />
    10→  }
    11→
    12→  return children
    13→}
    14→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { io } from 'socket.io-client'
     2→
     3→const SOCKET_URL = import.meta.env.VITE_SOCKET_URL || 'http://localhost:5000'
     4→
     5→export const socket = io(SOCKET_URL, {
     6→  autoConnect: false,
     7→  reconnection: true,
     8→  reconnectionDelay: 1000,
     9→  reconnectionAttempts: 5,
    10→})
    11→
    12→export function initSocket() {
    13→  if (!socket.connected) {
    14→    socket.connect()
    15→  }
    16→
    17→  const token = localStorage.getItem('accessToken')
    18→  if (token) {
    19→    socket.emit('authenticate', token)
    20→  }
    21→}
    22→
    23→export function joinRoom(room) {
    24→  socket.emit('joinRoom', room)
    25→}
    26→
    27→export function leaveRoom(room) {
    28→  socket.emit('leaveRoom', room)
    29→}
    30→
    31→export function joinAdminRoom() {
    32→  socket.emit('joinAdminRoom')
    33→}
    34→
    35→export function joinShipperRoom() {
    36→  socket.emit('joinShipperRoom')
    37→}
    38→
    39→export default socket
    40→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./\frontend\src\api\axiosClient.js`

```text
     1→import axios from 'axios'
     2→import toast from 'react-hot-toast'
     3→
     4→const axiosClient = axios.create({
     5→  baseURL: import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || 'http://localhost:5000/api',
     6→  headers: {
     7→    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
     8→  },
     9→})
    10→
    11→// Request interceptor - attach access token
    12→axiosClient.interceptors.request.use(
    13→  (config) => {
    14→    const token = localStorage.getItem('accessToken')
    15→    if (token) {
    16→      config.headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${token}`
    17→    }
    18→    return config
    19→  },
    20→  (error) => Promise.reject(error)
    21→)
    22→
    23→// Response interceptor - handle 401 with refresh token retry
    24→axiosClient.interceptors.response.use(
    25→  (response) => response,
    26→  async (error) => {
    27→    const originalRequest = error.config
    28→
    29→    if (error.response?.status === 401 && !originalRequest._retry) {
    30→      originalRequest._retry = true
    31→
    32→      try {
    33→        const refreshToken = localStorage.getItem('refreshToken')
    34→        if (!refreshToken) {
    35→          throw new Error('No refresh token')
    36→        }
    37→
    38→        const res = await axios.post(
    39→          `${import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || 'http://localhost:5000/api'}/auth/refresh-token`,
    40→          {},
    41→          {
    42→            headers: {
    43→              Authorization: `Bearer ${refreshToken}`,
    44→            },
    45→          }
    46→        )
    47→
    48→        const { accessToken, refreshToken: newRefreshToken } = res.data.data
    49→        localStorage.setItem('accessToken', accessToken)
    50→        localStorage.setItem('refreshToken', newRefreshToken)
    51→
    52→        originalRequest.headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${accessToken}`
    53→        return axiosClient(originalRequest)
    54→      } catch (refreshError) {
    55→        // Refresh failed - logout
    56→        localStorage.removeItem('accessToken')
    57→        localStorage.removeItem('refreshToken')
    58→        localStorage.removeItem('user')
    59→        toast.error('Session expired. Please login again.')
    60→        window.location.href = '/login'
    61→        return Promise.reject(refreshError)
    62→      }
    63→    }
    64→
    65→    return Promise.reject(error)
    66→  }
    67→)
    68→
    69→export const apiGet = (url, config) => axiosClient.get(url, config)
    70→export const apiPost = (url, data, config) => axiosClient.post(url, data, config)
    71→export const apiPut = (url, data, config) => axiosClient.put(url, data, config)
    72→export const apiPatch = (url, data, config) => axiosClient.patch(url, data, config)
    73→export const apiDelete = (url, config) => axiosClient.delete(url, config)
    74→
    75→export default axiosClient
    76→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-01 18:18:58Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./\frontend\src\slices\authSlice.js`

```text
     1→import { createSlice, createAsyncThunk } from '@reduxjs/toolkit'
     2→import axiosClient from '../api/axiosClient'
     3→
     4→const initialState = {
     5→  user: JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('user') || 'null'),
     6→  accessToken: localStorage.getItem('accessToken') || null,
     7→  refreshToken: localStorage.getItem('refreshToken') || null,
     8→  isAuthenticated: !!localStorage.getItem('accessToken'),
     9→  loading: false,
    10→  error: null,
    11→}
    12→
    13→export const login = createAsyncThunk(
    14→  'auth/login',
    15→  async (credentials, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    16→    try {
    17→      const res = await axiosClient.post('/auth/login', credentials)
    18→      const { user, accessToken, refreshToken } = res.data.data
    19→      localStorage.setItem('accessToken', accessToken)
    20→      localStorage.setItem('refreshToken', refreshToken)
    21→      localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(user))
    22→      return { user, accessToken, refreshToken }
    23→    } catch (error) {
    24→      return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Login failed')
    25→    }
    26→  }
    27→)
    28→
    29→export const register = createAsyncThunk(
    30→  'auth/register',
    31→  async (data, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    32→    try {
    33→      const res = await axiosClient.post('/auth/register', data)
    34→      const { user, accessToken, refreshToken } = res.data.data
    35→      localStorage.setItem('accessToken', accessToken)
    36→      localStorage.setItem('refreshToken', refreshToken)
    37→      localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(user))
    38→      return { user, accessToken, refreshToken }
    39→    } catch (error) {
    40→      return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Registration failed')
    41→    }
    42→  }
    43→)
    44→
    45→export const logout = createAsyncThunk('auth/logout', async (_, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    46→  try {
    47→    await axiosClient.post('/auth/logout')
    48→  } catch (error) {
    49→    // ignore error on logout
    50→  } finally {
    51→    localStorage.removeItem('accessToken')
    52→    localStorage.removeItem('refreshToken')
    53→    localStorage.removeItem('user')
    54→  }
    55→})
    56→
    57→export const refreshTokenAsync = createAsyncThunk(
    58→  'auth/refreshToken',
    59→  async (_, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    60→    try {
    61→      const refreshToken = localStorage.getItem('refreshToken')
    62→      const res = await axiosClient.post('/auth/refresh-token', {}, {
    63→        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${refreshToken}` },
    64→      })
    65→      const { accessToken, refreshToken: newRefreshToken } = res.data.data
    66→      localStorage.setItem('accessToken', accessToken)
    67→      localStorage.setItem('refreshToken', newRefreshToken)
    68→      return { accessToken, refreshToken: newRefreshToken }
    69→    } catch (error) {
    70→      localStorage.removeItem('accessToken')
    71→      localStorage.removeItem('refreshToken')
    72→      localStorage.removeItem('user')
    73→      return rejectWithValue('Session expired')
    74→    }
    75→  }
    76→)
    77→
    78→export const getProfile = createAsyncThunk(
    79→  'auth/getProfile',
    80→  async (_, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    81→    try {
    82→      const res = await axiosClient.get('/auth/profile')
    83→      const user = res.data.data
    84→      localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(user))
    85→      return user
    86→    } catch (error) {
    87→      return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to get profile')
    88→    }
    89→  }
    90→)
    91→
    92→export const updateProfile = createAsyncThunk(
    93→  'auth/updateProfile',
    94→  async (data, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    95→    try {
    96→      const res = await axiosClient.put('/auth/profile', data)
    97→      const user = res.data.data
    98→      localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(user))
    99→      return user
   100→    } catch (error) {
   101→      return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to update profile')
   102→    }
   103→  }
   104→)
   105→
   106→export const changePassword = createAsyncThunk(
   107→  'auth/changePassword',
   108→  async (data, { rejectWithValue }) => {
   109→    try {
   110→      await axiosClient.post('/auth/change-password', data)
   111→      return true
   112→    } catch (error) {
   113→      return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to change password')
   114→    }
   115→  }
   116→)
   117→
   118→const authSlice = createSlice({
   119→  name: 'auth',
   120→  initialState,
   121→  reducers: {
   122→    clearError: (state) => {
   123→      state.error = null
   124→    },
   125→  },
   126→  extraReducers: (builder) => {
   127→    // Login
   128→    builder.addCase(login.pending, (state) => {
   129→      state.loading = true
   130→      state.error = null
   131→    })
   132→    builder.addCase(login.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   133→      state.loading = false
   134→      state.user = action.payload.user
   135→      state.accessToken = action.payload.accessToken
   136→      state.refreshToken = action.payload.refreshToken
   137→      state.isAuthenticated = true
   138→    })
   139→    builder.addCase(login.rejected, (state, action) => {
   140→      state.loading = false
   141→      state.error = action.payload
   142→    })
   143→
   144→    // Register
   145→    builder.addCase(register.pending, (state) => {
   146→      state.loading = true
   147→      state.error = null
   148→    })
   149→    builder.addCase(register.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   150→      state.loading = false
   151→      state.user = action.payload.user
   152→      state.accessToken = action.payload.accessToken
   153→      state.refreshToken = action.payload.refreshToken
   154→      state.isAuthenticated = true
   155→    })
   156→    builder.addCase(register.rejected, (state, action) => {
   157→      state.loading = false
   158→      state.error = action.payload
   159→    })
   160→
   161→    // Logout
   162→    builder.addCase(logout.fulfilled, (state) => {
   163→      state.user = null
   164→      state.accessToken = null
   165→      state.refreshToken = null
   166→      state.isAuthenticated = false
   167→    })
   168→
   169→    // Refresh Token
   170→    builder.addCase(refreshTokenAsync.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   171→      state.accessToken = action.payload.accessToken
   172→      state.refreshToken = action.payload.refreshToken
   173→    })
   174→
   175→    // Get Profile
   176→    builder.addCase(getProfile.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   177→      state.user = action.payload
   178→      state.isAuthenticated = true
   179→    })
   180→
   181→    // Update Profile
   182→    builder.addCase(updateProfile.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   183→      state.user = action.payload
   184→    })
   185→
   186→    // Change Password
   187→    builder.addCase(changePassword.fulfilled, (state) => {
   188→      // success
   189→    })
   190→  },
   191→})
   192→
   193→export const { clearError } = authSlice.actions
   194→export default authSlice.reducer
   195→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { configureStore } from '@reduxjs/toolkit'
     2→import authReducer from '../slices/authSlice'
     3→import cartReducer from '../slices/cartSlice'
     4→import foodsReducer from '../slices/foodsSlice'

     6→import notificationsReducer from '../slices/notificationsSlice'

    10→  reducer: {
    11→    auth: authReducer,
    12→    cart: cartReducer,
    13→    foods: foodsReducer,
    14→    orders: ordersReducer,
    15→    notifications: notificationsReducer,
```

 `./\backend\src\services\socket.service.js`

```text
     1→let io = null;
     2→
     3→const setupSocket = (server) => {
     4→  const { Server } = require("socket.io");
     5→  io = new Server(server, {
     6→    cors: {
     7→      origin: process.env.CLIENT_URL || "*",
     8→      methods: ["GET", "POST"],
     9→    },
    10→  });
    11→
    12→  io.on("connection", (socket) => {
    13→    console.log(`Client connected: ${socket.id}`);
    14→
    15→    socket.on("join", (userId) => {
    16→      if (userId) {
    17→        socket.join(`user:${userId}`);
    18→      }
    19→    });
    20→
    21→    socket.on("leave", (userId) => {
    22→      if (userId) {
    23→        socket.leave(`user:${userId}`);
    24→      }
    25→    });
    26→
    27→    socket.on("disconnect", () => {
    28→      console.log(`Client disconnected: ${socket.id}`);
    29→    });
    30→  });
    31→
    32→  return io;
    33→};
    34→
    35→const getIO = () => {
    36→  if (!io) {
    37→    throw new Error("Socket.io not initialized");
    38→  }
    39→  return io;
    40→};
    41→
    42→const joinRoom = (userId) => {
    43→  if (io && userId) {
    44→    // Returns a function to join in a specific socket context
    45→    return `user:${userId}`;
    46→  }
    47→};
    48→
    49→const leaveRoom = (userId) => {
    50→  if (io && userId) {
    51→    return `user:${userId}`;
    52→  }
    53→};
    54→
    55→const emitToUser = (userId, event, data) => {
    56→  if (io && userId) {
    57→    io.to(`user:${userId}`).emit(event, data);
    58→  }
    59→};
    60→
    61→const emitToRoom = (room, event, data) => {
    62→  if (io) {
    63→    io.to(room).emit(event, data);
    64→  }
    65→};
    66→
    67→const emitToAdmins = (event, data) => {
    68→  if (io) {
    69→    io.to("admin").emit(event, data);
    70→  }
    71→};
    72→
    73→const emitToShippers = (event, data) => {
    74→  if (io) {
    75→    io.to("shipper").emit(event, data);
    76→  }
    77→};
    78→
    79→module.exports = {
    80→  setupSocket,
    81→  getIO,
    82→  joinRoom,
    83→  leaveRoom,
    84→  emitToUser,
    85→  emitToRoom,
    86→  emitToAdmins,
    87→  emitToShippers,
    88→};
    89→
```

```text
     1→const express = require("express");
     2→const helmet = require("helmet");
     3→const cors = require("cors");
     4→const path = require("path");
     5→
     6→const authRoutes = require("./routes/auth.routes");
     7→const foodRoutes = require("./routes/food.routes");
     8→const orderRoutes = require("./routes/order.routes");
     9→const couponRoutes = require("./routes/coupon.routes");
    10→const branchRoutes = require("./routes/branch.routes");
    11→const reviewRoutes = require("./routes/review.routes");
    12→const notificationRoutes = require("./routes/notification.routes");
    13→const adminRoutes = require("./routes/admin.routes");
    14→const uploadRoutes = require("./routes/upload.routes");
    15→const rateLimiter = require("./middlewares/rateLimiter.middleware");
    16→
    17→const app = express();
    18→
    19→// Security & Parsing middleware
    20→app.use(helmet());
    21→app.use(cors({ origin: process.env.CLIENT_URL || "*" }));
    22→app.use(express.json({ limit: "10mb" }));
    23→app.use(express.urlencoded({ extended: true, limit: "10mb" }));
    24→
    25→// Serve uploaded files
    26→app.use("/uploads", express.static(path.join(__dirname, "uploads")));
    27→
    28→// Rate limiting
    29→app.use(rateLimiter);
    30→
    31→// API Routes
    32→app.use("/api/auth", authRoutes);
    33→app.use("/api/foods", foodRoutes);
    34→app.use("/api/orders", orderRoutes);
    35→app.use("/api/coupons", couponRoutes);
    36→app.use("/api/branches", branchRoutes);
    37→app.use("/api/reviews", reviewRoutes);
    38→app.use("/api/notifications", notificationRoutes);
    39→app.use("/api/admin", adminRoutes);
    40→app.use("/api/upload", uploadRoutes);
    41→
    42→// Health check
    43→app.get("/api/health", (req, res) => {
    44→  res.json({ status: "ok", timestamp: new Date().toISOString() });
    45→});
    46→
    47→// 404 handler
    48→app.use((req, res) => {
    49→  res.status(404).json({ message: "Route not found" });
    50→});
    51→
    52→// Global error handler
    53→app.use((err, req, res, next) => {
    54→  console.error(`[Error] ${err.message}`);
    55→
    56→  if (err.name === "ZodError") {
    57→    return res.status(400).json({
    58→      message: "Validation error",
    59→      errors: err.errors,
    60→    });
    61→  }
    62→
    63→  if (err.message && err.message.includes("Only image files")) {
    64→    return res.status(400).json({ message: err.message });
    65→  }
    66→
    67→  res.status(err.statusCode || 500).json({
    68→    message: err.message || "Internal server error",
    69→  });
    70→});
    71→
    72→module.exports = app;
    73→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→require("dotenv").config();
     2→const http = require("http");
     3→const app = require("./app");
     4→const connectDB = require("./config/database");
     5→const { setupSocket } = require("./services/socket.service");
     6→
     7→const PORT = process.env.PORT || 5000;
     8→
     9→// Connect to MongoDB
    10→connectDB();
    11→
    12→// Create HTTP server
    13→const server = http.createServer(app);
    14→
    15→// Setup Socket.io
    16→setupSocket(server);
    17→
    18→// Start server
    19→server.listen(PORT, () => {
    20→  console.log(`Server running on port ${PORT}`);
    21→  console.log(`Environment: ${process.env.NODE_ENV || "development"}`);
    22→});
    23→
    24→// Graceful shutdown
    25→process.on("unhandledRejection", (err) => {
    26→  console.error("Unhandled Rejection:", err);
    27→  process.exit(1);
    28→});
    29→
    30→process.on("SIGTERM", () => {
    31→  console.log("SIGTERM received. Shutting down gracefully...");
    32→  server.close(() => {
    33→    console.log("Process terminated.");
    34→    process.exit(0);
    35→  });
    36→});
    37→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./\frontend\src\slices\cartSlice.js`

```text
     1→import { createSlice } from '@reduxjs/toolkit'
     2→
     3→const CART_STORAGE_KEY = 'res_booking_cart'
     4→
     5→const loadCartFromStorage = () => {
     6→  try {
     7→    const stored = localStorage.getItem(CART_STORAGE_KEY)
     8→    return stored ? JSON.parse(stored) : { items: [], deliveryFee: 0, coupon: null }
     9→  } catch {
    10→    return { items: [], deliveryFee: 0, coupon: null }
    11→  }
    12→}
    13→
    14→const saveCartToStorage = (cart) => {
    15→  try {
    16→    localStorage.setItem(CART_STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(cart))
    17→  } catch {
    18→    // ignore
    19→  }
    20→}
    21→
    22→const initialState = loadCartFromStorage()
    23→
    24→const cartSlice = createSlice({
    25→  name: 'cart',
    26→  initialState,
    27→  reducers: {
    28→    getCartFromStorage: (state) => {
    29→      const stored = loadCartFromStorage()
    30→      state.items = stored.items || []
    31→      state.deliveryFee = stored.deliveryFee || 0
    32→      state.coupon = stored.coupon || null
    33→    },
    34→    addItem: (state, action) => {
    35→      const { food, quantity, variant, toppings = [] } = action.payload
    36→      const variantStr = variant ? JSON.stringify(variant) : ''
    37→      const toppingsStr = JSON.stringify(toppings.sort((a, b) => a._id.localeCompare(b._id)))
    38→
    39→      const existingIndex = state.items.findIndex(
    40→        (item) =>
    41→          item.food._id === food._id &&
    42→          item.variantStr === variantStr &&
    43→          item.toppingsStr === toppingsStr
    44→      )
    45→
    46→      if (existingIndex >= 0) {
    47→        state.items[existingIndex].quantity += quantity
    48→      } else {
    49→        state.items.push({ food, quantity, variant, toppings, variantStr, toppingsStr })
    50→      }
    51→      saveCartToStorage(state)
    52→    },
    53→    removeItem: (state, action) => {
    54→      const index = action.payload
    55→      state.items.splice(index, 1)
    56→      saveCartToStorage(state)
    57→    },
    58→    updateQuantity: (state, action) => {
    59→      const { index, quantity } = action.payload
    60→      if (quantity <= 0) {
    61→        state.items.splice(index, 1)
    62→      } else {
    63→        state.items[index].quantity = quantity
    64→      }
    65→      saveCartToStorage(state)
    66→    },
    67→    clearCart: (state) => {
    68→      state.items = []
    69→      state.coupon = null
    70→      state.deliveryFee = 0
    71→      saveCartToStorage(state)
    72→    },
    73→    setCoupon: (state, action) => {
    74→      state.coupon = action.payload
    75→      saveCartToStorage(state)
    76→    },
    77→    setDeliveryFee: (state, action) => {
    78→      state.deliveryFee = action.payload
    79→      saveCartToStorage(state)
    80→    },
    81→  },
    82→})
    83→
    84→export const {
    85→  getCartFromStorage,
    86→  addItem,
    87→  removeItem,
    88→  updateQuantity,
    89→  clearCart,
    90→  setCoupon,
    91→  setDeliveryFee,
    92→} = cartSlice.actions
    93→
    94→// Selectors
    95→export const selectCartItems = (state) => state.cart.items
    96→export const selectCartTotal = (state) =>
    97→  state.cart.items.reduce((sum, item) => {
    98→    const variantPrice = item.variant?.price || 0
    99→    const toppingsPrice = item.toppings.reduce((t, tp) => t + (tp.price || 0), 0)
   100→    return sum + (item.food.price + variantPrice + toppingsPrice) * item.quantity
   101→  }, 0)
   102→export const selectCartCount = (state) =>
   103→  state.cart.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0)
   104→
   105→export default cartSlice.reducer
   106→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-01 18:22:49Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./\frontend\src\slices\ordersSlice.js`

```text
     1→import { createSlice, createAsyncThunk } from '@reduxjs/toolkit'
     2→import axiosClient from '../api/axiosClient'
     3→
     4→const initialState = {
     5→  orders: [],
     6→  currentOrder: null,
     7→  loading: false,
     8→  error: null,
     9→}
    10→
    11→export const createOrder = createAsyncThunk(
    12→  'orders/createOrder',
    13→  async (orderData, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    14→    try {
    15→      const res = await axiosClient.post('/orders', orderData)
    16→      return res.data.data
    17→    } catch (error) {
    18→      return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to create order')
    19→    }
    20→  }
    21→)
    22→
    23→export const fetchMyOrders = createAsyncThunk(
    24→  'orders/fetchMyOrders',
    25→  async (params = {}, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    26→    try {
    27→      const query = new URLSearchParams()
    28→      if (params.page) query.append('page', params.page)
    29→      if (params.limit) query.append('limit', params.limit)
    30→      if (params.status) query.append('status', params.status)
    31→
    32→      const res = await axiosClient.get(`/orders?${query.toString()}`)
    33→      return res.data
    34→    } catch (error) {
    35→      return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to fetch orders')
    36→    }
    37→  }
    38→)
    39→
    40→export const fetchOrderDetail = createAsyncThunk(
    41→  'orders/fetchOrderDetail',
    42→  async (id, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    43→    try {
    44→      const res = await axiosClient.get(`/orders/${id}`)
    45→      return res.data.data
    46→    } catch (error) {
    47→      return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to fetch order')
    48→    }
    49→  }
    50→)
    51→
    52→export const updateOrderStatus = createAsyncThunk(
    53→  'orders/updateOrderStatus',
    54→  async ({ id, status }, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    55→    try {
    56→      const res = await axiosClient.patch(`/orders/${id}/status`, { status })
    57→      return res.data.data
    58→    } catch (error) {
    59→      return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to update order status')
    60→    }
    61→  }
    62→)
    63→
    64→export const cancelOrder = createAsyncThunk(
    65→  'orders/cancelOrder',
    66→  async (id, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    67→    try {
    68→      const res = await axiosClient.post(`/orders/${id}/cancel`)
    69→      return res.data.data
    70→    } catch (error) {
    71→      return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to cancel order')
    72→    }
    73→  }
    74→)
    75→
    76→// Admin fetch all orders
    77→export const fetchAllOrders = createAsyncThunk(
    78→  'orders/fetchAllOrders',
    79→  async (params = {}, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    80→    try {
    81→      const query = new URLSearchParams()
    82→      if (params.page) query.append('page', params.page)
    83→      if (params.limit) query.append('limit', params.limit)
    84→      if (params.status) query.append('status', params.status)
    85→      if (params.search) query.append('search', params.search)
    86→
    87→      const res = await axiosClient.get(`/orders/all?${query.toString()}`)
    88→      return res.data
    89→    } catch (error) {
    90→      return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to fetch orders')
    91→    }
    92→  }
    93→)
    94→
    95→// Assign shipper
    96→export const assignShipper = createAsyncThunk(
    97→  'orders/assignShipper',
    98→  async ({ orderId, shipperId }, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    99→    try {
   100→      const res = await axiosClient.patch(`/orders/${orderId}/assign-shipper`, { shipperId })
   101→      return res.data.data
   102→    } catch (error) {
   103→      return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to assign shipper')
   104→    }
   105→  }
   106→)
   107→
   108→// Shipper accept order
   109→export const acceptOrder = createAsyncThunk(
   110→  'orders/acceptOrder',
   111→  async (orderId, { rejectWithValue }) => {
   112→    try {
   113→      const res = await axiosClient.post(`/orders/${orderId}/accept`)
   114→      return res.data.data
   115→    } catch (error) {
   116→      return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to accept order')
   117→    }
   118→  }
   119→)
   120→
   121→// Shipper complete order
   122→export const completeOrder = createAsyncThunk(
   123→  'orders/completeOrder',
   124→  async (orderId, { rejectWithValue }) => {
   125→    try {
   126→      const res = await axiosClient.post(`/orders/${orderId}/complete`)
   127→      return res.data.data
   128→    } catch (error) {
   129→      return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to complete order')
   130→    }
   131→  }
   132→)
   133→
   134→const ordersSlice = createSlice({
   135→  name: 'orders',
   136→  initialState,
   137→  reducers: {
   138→    clearCurrentOrder: (state) => {
   139→      state.currentOrder = null
   140→    },
   141→    clearError: (state) => {
   142→      state.error = null
   143→    },
   144→  },
   145→  extraReducers: (builder) => {
   146→    // Create Order
   147→    builder.addCase(createOrder.pending, (state) => {
   148→      state.loading = true
   149→      state.error = null
   150→    })
   151→    builder.addCase(createOrder.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   152→      state.loading = false
   153→      state.currentOrder = action.payload
   154→      state.orders.unshift(action.payload)
   155→    })
   156→    builder.addCase(createOrder.rejected, (state, action) => {
   157→      state.loading = false
   158→      state.error = action.payload
   159→    })
   160→
   161→    // Fetch My Orders
   162→    builder.addCase(fetchMyOrders.pending, (state) => {
   163→      state.loading = true
   164→      state.error = null
   165→    })
   166→    builder.addCase(fetchMyOrders.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   167→      state.loading = false
   168→      state.orders = action.payload.data || action.payload.orders || []
   169→    })
   170→    builder.addCase(fetchMyOrders.rejected, (state, action) => {
   171→      state.loading = false
   172→      state.error = action.payload
   173→    })
   174→
   175→    // Fetch Order Detail
   176→    builder.addCase(fetchOrderDetail.pending, (state) => {
   177→      state.loading = true
   178→      state.error = null
   179→    })
   180→    builder.addCase(fetchOrderDetail.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   181→      state.loading = false
   182→      state.currentOrder = action.payload
   183→    })
   184→    builder.addCase(fetchOrderDetail.rejected, (state, action) => {
   185→      state.loading = false
   186→      state.error = action.payload
   187→    })
   188→
   189→    // Update Order Status
   190→    builder.addCase(updateOrderStatus.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   191→      const idx = state.orders.findIndex((o) => o._id === action.payload._id)
   192→      if (idx >= 0) state.orders[idx] = action.payload
   193→      if (state.currentOrder?._id === action.payload._id) {
   194→        state.currentOrder = action.payload
   195→      }
   196→    })
   197→
   198→    // Cancel Order
   199→    builder.addCase(cancelOrder.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   200→      const idx = state.orders.findIndex((o) => o._id === action.payload._id)
   201→      if (idx >= 0) state.orders[idx] = action.payload
   202→      if (state.currentOrder?._id === action.payload._id) {
   203→        state.currentOrder = action.payload
   204→      }
   205→    })
   206→
   207→    // Fetch All Orders (admin)
   208→    builder.addCase(fetchAllOrders.pending, (state) => {
   209→      state.loading = true
   210→    })
   211→    builder.addCase(fetchAllOrders.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   212→      state.loading = false
   213→      state.orders = action.payload.data || action.payload.orders || []
   214→    })
   215→    builder.addCase(fetchAllOrders.rejected, (state, action) => {
   216→      state.loading = false
   217→      state.error = action.payload
   218→    })
   219→
   220→    // Assign Shipper
   221→    builder.addCase(assignShipper.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   222→      const idx = state.orders.findIndex((o) => o._id === action.payload._id)
   223→      if (idx >= 0) state.orders[idx] = action.payload
   224→    })
   225→
   226→    // Accept Order (shipper)
   227→    builder.addCase(acceptOrder.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   228→      const idx = state.orders.findIndex((o) => o._id === action.payload._id)
   229→      if (idx >= 0) state.orders[idx] = action.payload
   230→      if (state.currentOrder?._id === action.payload._id) {
   231→        state.currentOrder = action.payload
   232→      }
   233→    })
   234→
   235→    // Complete Order (shipper)
   236→    builder.addCase(completeOrder.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   237→      const idx = state.orders.findIndex((o) => o._id === action.payload._id)
   238→      if (idx >= 0) state.orders[idx] = action.payload
   239→      if (state.currentOrder?._id === action.payload._id) {
   240→        state.currentOrder = action.payload
   241→      }
   242→    })
   243→  },
   244→})
   245→
   246→export const { clearCurrentOrder, clearError } = ordersSlice.actions
   247→export default ordersSlice.reducer
   248→
```
</details></tool-use>

Now let me check the backend order controller to see if the endpoints match what the frontend expects. The frontend uses:
- `POST /orders` - create
- `GET /orders` - fetchMyOrders (should be `/orders/my-orders` based on backend route)

- `POST /orders/:id/cancel` - cancelOrder

- `PATCH /orders/:id/assign-shipper` - assignShipper (backend route is `/orders/:id/shipper`)
- `POST /orders/:id/accept` - acceptOrder (not in backend)
- `POST /orders/:id/complete` - completeOrder (not in backend)

```text
     1→const Booking = require("../models/Booking.model");
     2→const Food = require("../models/Food.model");
     3→const Coupon = require("../models/Coupon.model");
     4→const Notification = require("../models/Notification.model");
     5→const { ORDER_STATUS } = require("../utils/constants");
     6→const asyncHandler = require("../utils/asyncHandler");
     7→const ApiResponse = require("../utils/ApiResponse");
     8→const { emitToUser, emitToAdmins } = require("../services/socket.service");
     9→
    10→const VALID_TRANSITIONS = {
    11→  [ORDER_STATUS.PENDING]: [ORDER_STATUS.CONFIRMED, ORDER_STATUS.CANCELLED],
    12→  [ORDER_STATUS.CONFIRMED]: [ORDER_STATUS.PREPARING, ORDER_STATUS.CANCELLED],
    13→  [ORDER_STATUS.PREPARING]: [ORDER_STATUS.PICKING, ORDER_STATUS.CANCELLED],
    14→  [ORDER_STATUS.PICKING]: [ORDER_STATUS.DELIVERING],
    15→  [ORDER_STATUS.DELIVERING]: [ORDER_STATUS.DELIVERED],
    16→  [ORDER_STATUS.DELIVERED]: [],
    17→  [ORDER_STATUS.CANCELLED]: [],
    18→};
    19→
    20→const createOrder = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    21→  const {
    22→    items,
    23→    fulfillmentType,
    24→    branch,
    25→    shippingAddress,
    26→    paymentMethod,
    27→    couponCode,
    28→    note,
    29→    estimatedDelivery,
    30→  } = req.body;
    31→
    32→  if (!items || items.length === 0) {
    33→    return res.status(400).json({ message: "Order must have at least one item" });
    34→  }
    35→
    36→  // Fetch foods and calculate subtotal
    37→  const foodIds = items.map((item) => item.food);
    38→  const foods = await Food.find({ _id: { $in: foodIds } });
    39→  const foodMap = {};
    40→  foods.forEach((f) => (foodMap[f._id.toString()] = f));
    41→
    42→  let subtotal = 0;
    43→  const orderItems = items.map((item) => {
    44→    const food = foodMap[item.food];
    45→    if (!food) throw new Error(`Food ${item.food} not found`);
    46→
    47→    let itemPrice = food.price;
    48→    if (item.variant) itemPrice += item.variant.price || 0;
    49→    const toppingsPrice = (item.toppings || []).reduce((sum, t) => sum + (t.price || 0), 0);
    50→    itemPrice += toppingsPrice;
    51→
    52→    const totalPrice = itemPrice * item.quantity;
    53→    subtotal += totalPrice;
    54→
    55→    // Update sold count
    56→    food.soldCount += item.quantity;
    57→    food.save();
    58→
    59→    return {
    60→      food: food._id,
    61→      name: food.name,
    62→      image: food.images?.[0] || "",
    63→      price: totalPrice / item.quantity,
    64→      quantity: item.quantity,
    65→      variant: item.variant,
    66→      toppings: item.toppings || [],
    67→      note: item.note,
    68→    };
    69→  });
    70→
    71→  // Apply coupon
    72→  let discountAmount = 0;
    73→  let coupon = null;
    74→  if (couponCode) {
    75→    coupon = await Coupon.findOne({ code: couponCode.toUpperCase(), isActive: true });
    76→    if (coupon) {
    77→      const now = new Date();
    78→      if (coupon.startDate <= now && coupon.endDate >= now) {
    79→        if (!coupon.usageLimit || coupon.usedCount < coupon.usageLimit) {
    80→          if (subtotal >= coupon.minOrder) {
    81→            if (coupon.type === "percent") {
    82→              discountAmount = (subtotal * coupon.value) / 100;
    83→              if (coupon.maxDiscount) discountAmount = Math.min(discountAmount, coupon.maxDiscount);
    84→            } else {
    85→              discountAmount = coupon.value;
    86→            }
    87→            coupon.usedCount += 1;
    88→            await coupon.save();
    89→          }
    90→        }
    91→      }
    92→    }
    93→  }
    94→
    95→  // Delivery fee
    96→  let deliveryFee = 0;
    97→  if (fulfillmentType === "delivery") {
    98→    deliveryFee = coupon?.freeShipping ? 0 : 15000;
    99→  }
   100→
   101→  const total = subtotal - discountAmount + deliveryFee;
   102→
   103→  // Generate order code
   104→  const timestamp = Date.now();
   105→  const seq = (await Booking.countDocuments()) + 1;
   106→  const orderCode = `ORD${timestamp}${seq}`;
   107→
   108→  const order = await Booking.create({
   109→    orderCode,
   110→    user: req.user._id,
   111→    items: orderItems,
   112→    subtotal,
   113→    discountAmount,
   114→    deliveryFee,
   115→    total,
   116→    fulfillmentType: fulfillmentType || "delivery",
   117→    branch,
   118→    shippingAddress,
   119→    paymentMethod: paymentMethod || "COD",
   120→    coupon: coupon?._id,
   121→    note,
   122→    estimatedDelivery,
   123→    status: ORDER_STATUS.PENDING,
   124→  });
   125→
   126→  // Notify admins
   127→  const populatedOrder = await Booking.findById(order._id)
   128→    .populate("user", "name email phone")
   129→    .populate("items.food", "name price images");
   130→
   131→  emitToAdmins("newOrder", { order: populatedOrder });
   132→
   133→  return res.status(201).json(new ApiResponse(201, order, "Order created successfully"));
   134→});
   135→
   136→const getMyOrders = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   137→  const { page = 1, limit = 10, status } = req.query;
   138→  const query = { user: req.user._id };
   139→  if (status) query.status = status;
   140→
   141→  const skip = (Number(page) - 1) * Number(limit);
   142→  const total = await Booking.countDocuments(query);
   143→  const orders = await Booking.find(query)
   144→    .sort("-createdAt")
   145→    .skip(skip)
   146→    .limit(Number(limit))
   147→    .populate("items.food", "name images price")
   148→    .populate("branch", "name address");
   149→
   150→  return res.status(200).json(
   151→    new ApiResponse(200, {
   152→      orders,
   153→      pagination: {
   154→        total,
   155→        page: Number(page),
   156→        pages: Math.ceil(total / Number(limit)),
   157→      },
   158→    })
   159→  );
   160→});
   161→
   162→const getOrderDetail = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   163→  const { id } = req.params;
   164→  const order = await Booking.findById(id)
   165→    .populate("user", "name email phone")
   166→    .populate("items.food", "name images price category")
   167→    .populate("branch", "name address phone")
   168→    .populate("shipper", "name phone")
   169→    .populate("coupon");
   170→
   171→  if (!order) {
   172→    return res.status(404).json({ message: "Order not found" });
   173→  }
   174→
   175→  if (order.user._id.toString() !== req.user._id.toString() && req.user.role !== "admin") {
   176→    return res.status(403).json({ message: "Access denied" });
   177→  }
   178→
   179→  return res.status(200).json(new ApiResponse(200, order));
   180→});
   181→
   182→const updateOrderStatus = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   183→  const { id } = req.params;
   184→  const { status } = req.body;
   185→
   186→  const order = await Booking.findById(id);
   187→  if (!order) {
   188→    return res.status(404).json({ message: "Order not found" });
   189→  }
   190→
   191→  const validNext = VALID_TRANSITIONS[order.status] || [];
   192→  if (!validNext.includes(status)) {
   193→    return res
   194→      .status(400)
   195→      .json({ message: `Cannot transition from ${order.status} to ${status}` });
   196→  }
   197→
   198→  order.status = status;
   199→  await order.save();
   200→
   201→  const populatedOrder = await Booking.findById(order._id)
   202→    .populate("user", "name email")
   203→    .populate("shipper", "name phone");
   204→
   205→  // Notify user
   206→  emitToUser(order.user.toString(), "orderStatusUpdate", {
   207→    orderId: order._id,
   208→    status: order.status,
   209→  });
   210→
   211→  // Notify shipper if assigned
   212→  if (order.shipper) {
   213→    emitToUser(order.shipper.toString(), "orderStatusUpdate", {
   214→      orderId: order._id,
   215→      status: order.status,
   216→    });
   217→  }
   218→
   219→  // Create notification
   220→  await Notification.create({
   221→    user: order.user,
   222→    type: "order",
   223→    title: "Order Status Updated",
   224→    message: `Your order ${order.orderCode} is now ${status}`,
   225→    data: { orderId: order._id, status },
   226→  });
   227→
   228→  return res.status(200).json(new ApiResponse(200, populatedOrder, "Order status updated"));
   229→});
   230→
   231→const assignShipper = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   232→  const { id } = req.params;
   233→  const { shipperId } = req.body;
   234→
   235→  const order = await Booking.findById(id);
   236→  if (!order) {
   237→    return res.status(404).json({ message: "Order not found" });
   238→  }
   239→
   240→  order.shipper = shipperId;
   241→  order.status = ORDER_STATUS.PICKING;
   242→  await order.save();
   243→
   244→  const populatedOrder = await Booking.findById(order._id).populate("shipper", "name phone");
   245→
   246→  emitToUser(shipperId, "newDelivery", { order: populatedOrder });
   247→
   248→  await Notification.create({
   249→    user: shipperId,
   250→    type: "order",
   251→    title: "New Delivery Assignment",
   252→    message: `You have been assigned to deliver order ${order.orderCode}`,
   253→    data: { orderId: order._id },
   254→  });
   255→
   256→  return res.status(200).json(new ApiResponse(200, populatedOrder, "Shipper assigned"));
   257→});
   258→
   259→const cancelOrder = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   260→  const { id } = req.params;
   261→  const order = await Booking.findById(id);
   262→
   263→  if (!order) {
   264→    return res.status(404).json({ message: "Order not found" });
   265→  }
   266→
   267→  if (order.user.toString() !== req.user._id.toString() && req.user.role !== "admin") {
   268→    return res.status(403).json({ message: "Access denied" });
   269→  }
   270→
   271→  const cancellable = [ORDER_STATUS.PENDING, ORDER_STATUS.CONFIRMED];
   272→  if (!cancellable.includes(order.status)) {
   273→    return res.status(400).json({ message: "Order cannot be cancelled at this stage" });
   274→  }
   275→
   276→  order.status = ORDER_STATUS.CANCELLED;
   277→  await order.save();
   278→
   279→  emitToUser(order.user.toString(), "orderCancelled", {
   280→    orderId: order._id,
   281→    orderCode: order.orderCode,
   282→  });
   283→
   284→  return res.status(200).json(new ApiResponse(200, null, "Order cancelled"));
   285→});
   286→
   287→module.exports = {
   288→  createOrder,
   289→  getMyOrders,
   290→  getOrderDetail,
   291→  updateOrderStatus,
   292→  assignShipper,
   293→  cancelOrder,
   294→};
   295→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

 `./\frontend\src\slices\foodsSlice.js`

```text
     1→import { createSlice, createAsyncThunk } from '@reduxjs/toolkit'
     2→import axiosClient from '../api/axiosClient'
     3→
     4→const initialState = {
     5→  foods: [],
     6→  currentFood: null,
     7→  filters: {
     8→    search: '',
     9→    category: '',
    10→    sort: 'createdAt',
    11→    order: 'desc',
    12→    page: 1,
    13→    limit: 12,
    14→  },
    15→  pagination: {
    16→    total: 0,
    17→    page: 1,
    18→    limit: 12,
    19→    totalPages: 1,
    20→  },
    21→  loading: false,
    22→  error: null,
    23→}
    24→
    25→export const fetchFoods = createAsyncThunk(
    26→  'foods/fetchFoods',
    27→  async (params, { getState, rejectWithValue }) => {
    28→    try {
    29→      const state = getState()
    30→      const filters = params || state.foods.filters
    31→      const query = new URLSearchParams()
    32→      if (filters.search) query.append('search', filters.search)
    33→      if (filters.category) query.append('category', filters.category)
    34→      if (filters.sort) query.append('sort', filters.sort)
    35→      if (filters.order) query.append('order', filters.order)
    36→      if (filters.page) query.append('page', filters.page)
    37→      if (filters.limit) query.append('limit', filters.limit)
    38→
    39→      const res = await axiosClient.get(`/foods?${query.toString()}`)
    40→      return res.data
    41→    } catch (error) {
    42→      return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to fetch foods')
    43→    }
    44→  }
    45→)
    46→
    47→export const fetchFoodById = createAsyncThunk(
    48→  'foods/fetchFoodById',
    49→  async (id, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    50→    try {
    51→      const res = await axiosClient.get(`/foods/${id}`)
    52→      return res.data.data
    53→    } catch (error) {
    54→      return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to fetch food')
    55→    }
    56→  }
    57→)
    58→
    59→export const createFood = createAsyncThunk(
    60→  'foods/createFood',
    61→  async (data, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    62→    try {
    63→      const res = await axiosClient.post('/foods', data)
    64→      return res.data.data
    65→    } catch (error) {
    66→      return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to create food')
    67→    }
    68→  }
    69→)
    70→
    71→export const updateFood = createAsyncThunk(
    72→  'foods/updateFood',
    73→  async ({ id, data }, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    74→    try {
    75→      const res = await axiosClient.put(`/foods/${id}`, data)
    76→      return res.data.data
    77→    } catch (error) {
    78→      return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to update food')
    79→    }
    80→  }
    81→)
    82→
    83→export const deleteFood = createAsyncThunk(
    84→  'foods/deleteFood',
    85→  async (id, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    86→    try {
    87→      await axiosClient.delete(`/foods/${id}`)
    88→      return id
    89→    } catch (error) {
    90→      return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to delete food')
    91→    }
    92→  }
    93→)
    94→
    95→const foodsSlice = createSlice({
    96→  name: 'foods',
    97→  initialState,
    98→  reducers: {
    99→    setFilters: (state, action) => {
   100→      state.filters = { ...state.filters, ...action.payload }
   101→    },
   102→    resetFilters: (state) => {
   103→      state.filters = initialState.filters
   104→    },
   105→    clearCurrentFood: (state) => {
   106→      state.currentFood = null
   107→    },
   108→    clearError: (state) => {
   109→      state.error = null
   110→    },
   111→  },
   112→  extraReducers: (builder) => {
   113→    // Fetch Foods
   114→    builder.addCase(fetchFoods.pending, (state) => {
   115→      state.loading = true
   116→      state.error = null
   117→    })
   118→    builder.addCase(fetchFoods.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   119→      state.loading = false
   120→      state.foods = action.payload.data || action.payload.foods || []
   121→      if (action.payload.pagination) {
   122→        state.pagination = action.payload.pagination
   123→      } else if (action.payload.total !== undefined) {
   124→        state.pagination = {
   125→          total: action.payload.total,
   126→          page: action.payload.page || state.filters.page,
   127→          limit: action.payload.limit || state.filters.limit,
   128→          totalPages: Math.ceil(
   129→            (action.payload.total) / (action.payload.limit || state.filters.limit)
   130→          ),
   131→        }
   132→      }
   133→    })
   134→    builder.addCase(fetchFoods.rejected, (state, action) => {
   135→      state.loading = false
   136→      state.error = action.payload
   137→    })
   138→
   139→    // Fetch Food By ID
   140→    builder.addCase(fetchFoodById.pending, (state) => {
   141→      state.loading = true
   142→      state.error = null
   143→    })
   144→    builder.addCase(fetchFoodById.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   145→      state.loading = false
   146→      state.currentFood = action.payload
   147→    })
   148→    builder.addCase(fetchFoodById.rejected, (state, action) => {
   149→      state.loading = false
   150→      state.error = action.payload
   151→    })
   152→
   153→    // Create Food
   154→    builder.addCase(createFood.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   155→      state.foods.unshift(action.payload)
   156→    })
   157→
   158→    // Update Food
   159→    builder.addCase(updateFood.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   160→      const index = state.foods.findIndex((f) => f._id === action.payload._id)
   161→      if (index >= 0) state.foods[index] = action.payload
   162→      if (state.currentFood?._id === action.payload._id) state.currentFood = action.payload
   163→    })
   164→
   165→    // Delete Food
   166→    builder.addCase(deleteFood.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   167→      state.foods = state.foods.filter((f) => f._id !== action.payload)
   168→    })
   169→  },
   170→})
   171→
   172→export const { setFilters, resetFilters, clearCurrentFood, clearError } = foodsSlice.actions
   173→export default foodsSlice.reducer
   174→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { clsx } from 'clsx'

    12→ * Format currency in VND
    13→ */
    14→export function formatCurrency(amount) {
    15→  return new Intl.NumberFormat('vi-VN', {
    16→    style: 'currency',
    17→    currency: 'VND',
    18→    minimumFractionDigits: 0,
    19→  }).format(amount)
    20→}
    21→
    22→/**
    23→ * Format date
    24→ */
    25→export function formatDate(dateString, options = {}) {
    26→  if (!dateString) return ''
    27→  const defaultOptions = {
    28→    day: '2-digit',
    29→    month: '2-digit',
    30→    year: 'numeric',
    31→    ...options,
    32→  }
    33→  return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('vi-VN', defaultOptions)
    34→}
    35→
    36→/**
    37→ * Format date with time
    38→ */
    39→export function formatDateTime(dateString) {
    40→  if (!dateString) return ''
    41→  return new Date(dateString).toLocaleString('vi-VN', {
    42→    day: '2-digit',
    43→    month: '2-digit',
    44→    year: 'numeric',
    45→    hour: '2-digit',
    46→    minute: '2-digit',
    47→  })
    48→}
    49→
    50→/**
    51→ * Format relative time
    52→ */
    53→export function formatRelativeTime(dateString) {
    54→  if (!dateString) return ''
    55→  const date = new Date(dateString)
    56→  const now = new Date()
    57→  const diff = now - date
    58→  const seconds = Math.floor(diff / 1000)
    59→  const minutes = Math.floor(seconds / 60)
    60→  const hours = Math.floor(minutes / 60)
    61→  const days = Math.floor(hours / 24)
    62→
    63→  if (days > 0) return `${days} ngay truoc`
    64→  if (hours > 0) return `${hours} gio truoc`
    65→  if (minutes > 0) return `${minutes} phut truoc`
    66→  return 'Vua xong'
    67→}
    68→
```

```text
    14→  price: yup.number().typeError('Gia phai la so').required('Gia la bat buoc').positive('Gia phai lon hon 0'),
    15→  category: yup.string().required('Danh muc la bat buoc'),

    31→
    32→export default function FoodFormModal({ isOpen, onClose, onSubmit, food }) {
    33→  const {
    34→    register,
    35→    handleSubmit,
    36→    reset,
    37→    watch,
    38→    setValue,
    39→    formState: { errors },
    40→  } = useForm({
    41→    resolver: yupResolver(schema),
    42→    defaultValues: {
    43→      name: '',
    44→      description: '',
    45→      price: '',
    46→      category: '',
    47→      image: '',
    48→      available: true,
    49→      variants: [],
    50→      toppings: [],
    51→    },
    52→  })
    53→
    54→  useEffect(() => {
    55→    if (food) {
    56→      reset({
    57→        name: food.name || '',
    58→        description: food.description || '',
    59→        price: food.price || '',
    60→        category: food.category || '',
    61→        image: food.image || '',
    62→        available: food.available ?? true,
    63→        variants: food.variants || [],
    64→        toppings: food.toppings || [],
    65→      })
    66→    } else {
    67→      reset({
    68→        name: '',
    69→        description: '',
    70→        price: '',
    71→        category: '',
    72→        image: '',
    73→        available: true,
    74→        variants: [],
    75→        toppings: [],
    76→      })
    77→    }
    78→  }, [food, reset, isOpen])
    79→
    80→  const watchImage = watch('image')
    81→
    82→  const categoryOptions = CATEGORIES.map((c) => ({ value: c.value, label: c.label }))
    83→
    84→  return (
    85→    <Modal
    86→      isOpen={isOpen}
    87→      onClose={onClose}
    88→      title={food ? 'Chinh sua mon an' : 'Them mon an moi'}
    89→      size="lg"
    90→    >
    91→      <form onSubmit={handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className="space-y-4">
    92→        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
    93→          <Input
    94→            label="Ten mon an"
    95→            {...register('name')}
    96→            error={errors.name?.message}
    97→            placeholder="VD: Com rang dui ga"
    98→          />
    99→          <Input
   100→            label="Gia (VND)"
   101→            type="number"
   102→            {...register('price')}
   103→            error={errors.price?.message}
   104→            placeholder="VD: 45000"
   105→          />
   106→        </div>
   107→
   108→        <Select
   109→          label="Danh muc"
   110→          {...register('category')}
   111→          error={errors.category?.message}
   112→          options={categoryOptions}
   113→          placeholder="Chon danh muc"
   114→        />
   115→
   116→        <div>
   117→          <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1.5">Mo ta</label>
   118→          <textarea
   119→            {...register('description')}
   120→            rows={3}
   121→            className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 text-sm border border-gray-200 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary"
   122→            placeholder="Mo ta mon an..."
   123→          />
   124→          {errors.description && (
   125→            <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-red-500">{errors.description.message}</p>
   126→          )}
   127→        </div>
   128→
   129→        <Input
   130→          label="Hinh anh (URL)"
   131→          {...register('image')}
   132→          placeholder="https://..."
   133→        />
   134→        {watchImage && (
   135→          <div className="mt-2">
   136→            <img
   137→              src={watchImage}
   138→              alt="Preview"
   139→              className="w-32 h-32 object-cover rounded-lg border"
   140→              onError={(e) => {
   141→                e.target.style.display = 'none'
   142→              }}
   143→            />
   144→          </div>
   145→        )}
   146→
   147→        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   148→          <input
   149→            type="checkbox"
   150→            id="available"
   151→            {...register('available')}
   152→            className="w-4 h-4 text-primary border-gray-300 rounded focus:ring-primary"
   153→          />
   154→          <label htmlFor="available" className="text-sm text-gray-700">
   155→            Mon an san sang phuc vu
   156→          </label>
   157→        </div>
   158→
   159→        <div className="flex gap-3 pt-4 border-t">
   160→          <Button type="button" variant="ghost" onClick={onClose} className="flex-1">
   161→            Huy
   162→          </Button>
   163→          <Button type="submit" className="flex-1">
   164→            {food ? 'Luu thay doi' : 'Them mon an'}
   165→          </Button>
   166→        </div>
   167→      </form>
   168→    </Modal>
```
